items.title: An Incremental Placement Flow for Advanced FPGAs With Timing Awareness.
items.abstract: As interconnects dominate circuit performance in modern field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs), placement becomes a crucial stage for timing closure. Traditional FPGA placers seldom consider the timing constraints and, thus, may lead to illegal routing solutions. In this article, we present an incremental timing-driven placement flow for advanced FPGAs. First, a timing-based global placement strategy is designed to guide heterogeneous blocks to desired locations with satisfied timing constraints. Then, a timing-aware packing algorithm is developed to mitigate the design complexity while improving the timing results. Finally, we propose a critical path-based optimization method to generate optimized layout without timing violations. We evaluate our algorithm based on industrial circuits using an advanced FPGA device. The experimental results show that our placer achieves a 5.1% improvement in worst slack and produce placements that require 16.7% less time to route when compared with the leading commercial tool Xilinx Vivado.
items.abstract_zh: 由于互连在现代现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 中的电路性能中占主导地位，布局成为时序收敛的关键阶段。传统 FPGA 布局器很少考虑时序约束，因此可能导致非法布线解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于高级 FPGA 的增量时序驱动布局流程。首先，设计基于时序的全局布局策略，以在满足时序约束的情况下将异构块引导至所需位置。然后，开发了一种时序感知打包算法，以降低设计复杂性，同时改善时序结果。最后，我们提出了一种基于关键路径的优化方法来生成没有时序违规的优化布局。我们使用先进的 FPGA 设备基于工业电路评估我们的算法。实验结果表明，与领先的商业工具 Xilinx Vivado 相比，我们的布局器在最差裕度方面实现了 5.1% 的改进，并且产生的布局所需的布线时间减少了 16.7%。

items.title: Lite-Stereo: A Resource-Efficient Hardware Accelerator for Real-Time High-Quality Stereo Estimation Using Binary Neural Network.
items.abstract: Stereo estimation plays a key role in many autonomous systems, such as robotics and self-driving cars. Recent work on StereoEngine, an FPGA-based accelerator for deep neural network (DNN)-based stereo estimation, has been demonstrated as a promising solution to achieve both real-time and high accuracy performance for depth sensing. However, this solution still suffers from over-utilizing the hardware resource of FPGAs. In this article, we present Lite-Stereo, a resource-efficient DNN-based stereo vision accelerator to improve the hardware efficiency for StereoEngine running on a resource-constrained FPGA. To achieve this, we design a set of optimized hardware architectures for resource-demanding bottleneck modules. In order to balance the gap between the processing speed and resource efficiency, the process elements in binary neural network modules are shared within and across modules. In addition, we provide reusing strategies on path aggregation and neighbor calculation to improve the resource efficiency of the semi-global matching module. Evaluation results demonstrate that Lite-Stereo reduces the hardware cost of ALUTs and RAM bits by 60% and 29%, respectively, without compromising the accuracy and energy efficiency compared with StereoEngine.
items.abstract_zh: 立体估计在许多自主系统中发挥着关键作用，例如机器人和自动驾驶汽车。 StereoEngine 是一种基于 FPGA 的加速器，用于基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的立体估计，其最近的工作已被证明是一种有前途的解决方案，可实现深度传感的实时和高精度性能。然而，该解决方案仍然存在过度利用 FPGA 硬件资源的问题。在本文中，我们介绍了 Lite-Stereo，这是一种基于 DNN 的资源高效型立体视觉加速器，可提高在资源受限的 FPGA 上运行的 StereoEngine 的硬件效率。为了实现这一目标，我们针对资源要求较高的瓶颈模块设计了一套优化的硬件架构。为了平衡处理速度和资源效率之间的差距，二元神经网络模块中的处理元素在模块内和模块间共享。此外，我们提供了路径聚合和邻居计算的重用策略，以提高半全局匹配模块的资源效率。评估结果表明，与 StereoEngine 相比，Lite-Stereo 将 ALUT 和 RAM 位的硬件成本分别降低了 60% 和 29%，且不影响准确性和能源效率。

items.title: Search-Free Inference Acceleration for Sparse Convolutional Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Sparse convolution neural networks (CNNs) are promising in reducing both memory usage and computational complexity while still preserving high inference accuracy. State-of-the-art sparse CNN accelerators can deliver high throughput by skipping zero weights and/or activations. To operate on only nonzero weights and activations, sparse accelerators typically search pairs of nonzero weights and activations for multiplication-accumulation (MAC) operations. However, the conventional search operation results in a severe limitation in the processing element (PE) array scale because of the enormous demands of internal interconnection and memory bandwidth. In this article, we first provide a design principle to free the search process of sparse CNN accelerations. Specifically, the indexes of the static compressed weights access the dynamic activations directly to avoid the search process for MAC operations. We then develop two search-free inference accelerators, called Swan and Swan-flexible, for sparse CNN accelerations. Swan supports search-free sparse convolution accelerations for interconnection and bandwidth saving. Compared with Swan, Swan-flexible not only has the search-free capability but also comprises a configurable architecture for optimum throughput. We formulate a mathematical optimization problem by combining the configurable characterization with the compressive dataflow to optimize the overall throughput. Evaluations based on a place-and-route process show that the proposed designs, in a compact factor of 4096 PEs, achieve 1.5– 2.7× higher speedup and 6.0– 13.6× better energy efficiency than representative accelerator baselines with the same PE array scale.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏卷积神经网络（CNN）有望减少内存使用和计算复杂性，同时仍保持高推理精度。最先进的稀疏 CNN 加速器可以通过跳过零权重和/或激活来提供高吞吐量。为了仅对非零权重和激活进行操作，稀疏加速器通常搜索非零权重和激活对以进行乘法累加（MAC）运算。然而，由于内部互连和内存带宽的巨大需求，传统的搜索操作导致处理元件（PE）阵列规模的严重限制。在本文中，我们首先提供了一种设计原理，以释放稀疏 CNN 加速的搜索过程。具体来说，静态压缩权重的索引直接访问动态激活以避免MAC运算的搜索过程。然后，我们开发了两个免搜索推理加速器，称为 Swan 和 Swan-flexible，用于稀疏 CNN 加速。 Swan 支持免搜索稀疏卷积加速，以实现互连和节省带宽。与 Swan 相比，Swan-flexible 不仅具有免搜索功能，而且还包含可配置的架构以实现最佳吞吐量。我们通过将可配置表征与压缩数据流相结合来制定数学优化问题，以优化整体吞吐量。基于布局布线过程的评估表明，所提出的设计在 4096 个 PE 的紧凑因子中实现了 1.5– 2.7× 更高的加速和 6.0– 13.6× 更好的能量效率高于具有相同 PE 阵列规模的代表性加速器基线。

items.title: HyCA: A Hybrid Computing Architecture for Fault-Tolerant Deep Learning.
items.abstract: Hardware faults on the regular 2-D computing array of a typical deep learning accelerator (DLA) can lead to dramatic prediction accuracy loss. Prior redundancy design approaches typically have each homogeneous redundant processing element (PE) to mitigate faulty PEs for a limited region of the 2-D computing array rather than the entire computing array to avoid the excessive hardware overhead. However, they fail to recover the computing array when the number of faulty PEs in any region exceeds the number of redundant PEs in the same region. The mismatch problem deteriorates when the fault injection rate rises and the faults are unevenly distributed. To address the problem, we propose a hybrid computing architecture (HyCA) for fault-tolerant DLAs. It has a set of dot-production processing units (DPPUs) to recompute all the operations that are mapped to the faulty PEs despite the faulty PE locations. According to our experiments, HyCA shows significantly higher reliability, scalability, and performance with less chip area penalty when compared to the conventional redundancy approaches. Moreover, by taking advantage of the flexible recomputing, HyCA can also be utilized to scan the entire 2-D computing array and detect the faulty PEs effectively at runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 典型深度学习加速器 (DLA) 的常规二维计算阵列上的硬件故障可能会导致预测精度急剧下降。现有的冗余设计方法通常具有每个同构冗余处理元件(PE)，以减轻2D计算阵列的有限区域而不是整个计算阵列的故障PE，以避免过多的硬件开销。然而，当任意区域中的故障PE数量超过同一区域中的冗余PE数量时，它们将无法恢复计算阵列。当故障注入率上升且故障分布不均匀时，失配问题会恶化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于容错 DLA 的混合计算架构（HyCA）。它具有一组点生产处理单元 (DPPU)，用于重新计算映射到故障 PE 的所有操作，尽管 PE 位置有故障。根据我们的实验，与传统的冗余方法相比，HyCA 显示出明显更高的可靠性、可扩展性和性能，并且芯片面积损失更小。此外，利用灵活的重新计算，HyCA还可以用于扫描整个二维计算阵列，并在运行时有效地检测出故障的PE。

items.title: A Comprehensive Evaluation of Integrated Circuits Side-Channel Resilience Utilizing Three-Independent-Gate Silicon Nanowire Field Effect Transistors-Based Current Mode Logic.
items.abstract: Side-channel attack (SCA) is one of the physical attacks, which will reveal the confidential information from cryptographic circuits by statistically analyzing physical manifestations. Various circuit-level countermeasures have been proposed as fundamental solutions to eliminate the correlations between side-channel information and circuit’s internal operations. The existing solutions, however, will introduce nonnegligible power and area overheads, making them difficult to be deployed in resource-constrained applications. In this article, a novel three-independent-gate silicon nanowire field effect transistor (TIGFET) with the intrinsic SCA-resilience characteristics is introduced to balance the tradeoffs among cost, performance, and security of cryptographic implementations. We construct six TIGFET-based current mode logic (CML) gates that can retain lower power variation under all possible transitions compared to the CMOS counterparts. As a proof of concept, advanced encryption standard (AES), SM4 block cipher algorithm (SM4), and lightweight cryptographic algorithm PRESENT are implemented utilizing the TIGFET-based CML gates. Correlation power attack is performed to evaluate the improvement of SCA resilience. Simulation results verify that the TIGFET-based cryptographic implementations decrease 42.37% area usage, lower 61.16% energy efficiency, reduce 5.35× power variation, and achieve a similar level of SCA resistance compared to the CMOS counterpart, which is applicable for the resource-constrained applications.
items.abstract_zh: 旁道攻击（SCA）是物理攻击的一种，它通过统计分析物理表现来泄露密码电路中的机密信息。人们提出了各种电路级对策作为消除旁路信息与电路内部操作之间的相关性的根本解决方案。然而，现有的解决方案将带来不可忽视的功耗和面积开销，使得它们难以部署在资源受限的应用中。在本文中，介绍了一种具有固有 SCA 弹性特性的新型三独立栅极硅纳米线场效应晶体管 (TIGFET)，以平衡密码实现的成本、性能和安全性之间的权衡。我们构建了六个基于 TIGFET 的电流模式逻辑 (CML) 门，与 CMOS 对应物相比，它们可以在所有可能的转换下保持较低的功率变化。作为概念验证，高级加密标准 (AES)、SM4 分组密码算法 (SM4) 和轻量级加密算法 PRESENT 是利用基于 TIGFET 的 CML 门实现的。进行相关功率攻击来评估SCA弹性的提高。仿真结果验证基于 TIGFET 的加密实现减少了 42.37% 的面积使用，降低了 61.16% 的能源效率，减少了 5.35× 功率变化，并且与 CMOS 对应物相比实现了类似水平的 SCA 电阻，适用于资源受限的应用。

items.title: Knowledge Transfer in Board-Level Functional Fault Diagnosis Enabled by Domain Adaptation.
items.abstract: High integration densities and design complexity make board-level functional fault diagnosis extremely difficult. Machine-learning techniques can identify functional faults with high accuracy, but they require a large volume of data to achieve high-prediction accuracy. This drawback limits the effectiveness of traditional machine-learning algorithms for training a model in the early stage of manufacturing, when only a limited amount of fail data and repair records are available. We propose a board-level diagnosis workflow that utilizes domain adaptation (DA) to transfer the knowledge learned from mature boards to a new board in the ramp-up phase. First, based on the requirement of fault diagnosis, we select an appropriate domain-adaptation method to reduce differences between mature boards and the new board. Second, these DA methods utilize information from both the mature and the new boards with carefully designed domain-alignment rules and train a functional fault diagnosis classifier. Experimental results using three complex boards in volume production and one new board in the ramp-up phase show that, with the help of DA and the proposed workflow, the diagnosis accuracy is improved.
items.abstract_zh: 高集成密度和设计复杂性使得板级功能故障诊断变得极其困难。机器学习技术可以高精度识别功能故障，但需要大量数据才能实现高预测精度。这一缺点限制了传统机器学习算法在制造早期阶段训练模型的有效性，因为当时只有有限数量的故障数据和维修记录可用。我们提出了一个板级诊断工作流程，利用领域适应（DA）将从成熟板学到的知识转移到启动阶段的新板。首先，根据故障诊断的要求，选择合适的领域适配方法，以减少成熟单板与新单板之间的差异。其次，这些 DA 方法利用来自成熟板和新板的信息以及精心设计的域对齐规则，并训练功能性故障诊断分类器。在批量生产中使用三块复杂板和在试产阶段使用一块新板的实验结果表明，在 DA 和所提出的工作流程的帮助下，诊断准确性得到了提高。

items.title: Self-Adapting Channel Allocation for Multiple Tenants Sharing SSD Devices.
items.abstract: Solid-state drives (SSDs) have been widely deployed in high-performance data center environments, where multiple tenants usually share the same hardware. However, traditional SSDs distribute the users’ incoming data uniformly across all SSD channels, which leads to numerous access conflicts. Meanwhile, SSDs that blindly allocate one or several channels to one tenant sacrifice device parallelism and capacity. When SSDs are shared by tenants with different access patterns, inappropriate channel allocation results in SSD performance degradation. In this article, we propose a self-adapting channel allocation mechanism, named SSDKeeper, for multiple tenants that share one SSD. SSDKeeper employs a machine learning-assisted algorithm to take full advantage of SSD parallelism while providing performance isolation. By collecting multitenant access patterns, SSDKeeper predicts an optimal channel allocation strategy for multiple tenants using the well-trained model. To further consume the blocks in different channels evenly, SSDKeeper equips with a novel channel swap scheme to prolong the SSD lifespan. Comparing with traditional SSDs, SSDKeeper reduces the overall latency of read and write by 12.6% and the lifespan is prolonged up to 3.7× .
items.abstract_zh: 固态硬盘 (SSD) 已广泛部署在高性能数据中心环境中，其中多个租户通常共享相同的硬件。然而，传统SSD将用户传入的数据均匀分布在所有SSD通道上，这会导致大量的访问冲突。与此同时，SSD盲目地将一个或多个通道分配给一个租户会牺牲设备并行性和容量。当不同访问模式的租户共享SSD时，不适当的通道分配会导致SSD性能下降。在本文中，我们为共享一个 SSD 的多个租户提出了一种自适应通道分配机制，名为 SSDKeeper。 SSDKeeper 采用机器学习辅助算法，充分利用 SSD 并行性，同时提供性能隔离。通过收集多租户访问模式，SSDKeeper 使用训练有素的模型预测多个租户的最佳通道分配策略。为了进一步均匀地消耗不同通道中的块，SSDKeeper配备了一种新颖的通道交换方案来延长SSD的使用寿命。与传统SSD相比，SSDKeeper整体读写延迟降低12.6%，寿命延长至 3.7× 。

items.title: A Don't-Care-Based Approach to Reducing the Multiplicative Complexity in Logic Networks.
items.abstract: Reducing the number of AND gates in logic networks benefits the applications in cryptography, security, and quantum computing. This work proposes a don’t-care-based (DC-based) approach to reduce the number of AND gates further in the well-optimized network. Furthermore, this work also proposes an enhanced synthesis flow by integrating our approach with the state-of-the-art. The experimental results show that our approach can further reduce up to 25% of the number of AND gates in the network. For the experiments about the enhanced synthesis flow, we achieve a speedup of almost 10× on average for the cryptography benchmarks while having competitive results as compared to the flow in the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 减少逻辑网络中与门的数量有利于密码学、安全和量子计算中的应用。这项工作提出了一种基于无关（基于 DC）的方法来进一步减少优化良好的网络中与门的数量。此外，这项工作还通过将我们的方法与最先进的技术相结合，提出了一种增强的合成流程。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以进一步减少网络中最多 25% 的 AND 门数量。对于增强综合流程的实验，我们在密码学基准测试中平均实现了几乎 10× 的加速，同时具有与最先进的流程相比，具有竞争力的结果。

items.title: An Efficient BCNN Deployment Method Using Quality-Aware Approximate Computing.
items.abstract: As the artificial intelligence and Internet of Things (AIoT) develop rapidly, the deployment of artificial neural networks in edge computing is becoming significant with great challenge. The binarized convolutional neural network (BCNN) is one of the most widely adopted light-weight ANNs in AIoT, which can achieve the balance of system accuracy and hardware resource consumption, compared to others. To achieve high power and area efficiency in BCNN deployment, many approximate computing (AxC) techniques are integrated to make full use of the resilience of BCNN. As the research focused on the integration of AxC in circuit design, the design of AxC itself is not fully considered when applied to specific applications or domains. Based on circuit-architecture-system co-design, this article proposes an efficient BCNN deployment method, including a quality-circuit co-design method for approximate adder generation, a quality-aware intercompensation approach for addition tree, and a computing quality involved retraining approach for BCNN deployment. Experimental results show that the proposed quality model can achieve 86.43% in average accuracy while evaluating nine types of typical approximate adders. The proposed method is conducted on the applications of keyword spotting of GSCD, MNIST, and CIFAR-10, and we can further rise the approximation degree by 50%–75%, while reducing the accuracy by less than 1%.
items.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能和物联网（AIoT）的快速发展，人工神经网络在边缘计算中的部署变得越来越重要，也面临着巨大的挑战。二值化卷积神经网络（BCNN）是AIoT中应用最广泛的轻量级ANN之一，与其他网络相比，它可以实现系统精度和硬件资源消耗的平衡。为了在 BCNN 部署中实现高功率和面积效率，集成了许多近似计算（AxC）技术，以充分利用 BCNN 的弹性。由于研究重点是AxC在电路设计中的集成，AxC本身的设计在应用于特定应用或领域时并未得到充分考虑。基于电路-架构-系统协同设计，本文提出了一种高效的 BCNN 部署方法，包括用于近似加法器生成的质量-电路协同设计方法、用于加法树的质量感知相互补偿方法以及用于 BCNN 部署的涉及计算质量的再训练方法。实验结果表明，所提出的质量模型在评估九种典型近似加法器时平均精度可达86.43%。该方法在 GSCD、MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 的关键词识别应用上进行，可以将近似度进一步提高 50%~75%，同时准确率降低不到 1%。

items.title: A Simulation Framework for Memristor-Based Heterogeneous Computing Architectures.
items.abstract: Memristor-based accelerator (MBA) has demonstrated its capability in accelerating matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) with high performance and energy efficiency. However, it is hard to determine whether and how well an application can benefit from MBAs in a heterogeneous computing architecture. In this article, we propose a simulation framework called MHSim to evaluate the energy efficiency and performance of applications running with both MBAs and CPUs. MHSim provides flexible system-level interfaces and circuit-level simulation models for designers to configure heterogeneous computing architectures. We design a general-purpose MBA which enables floating-point computation models for general matrix-matrix multiplication (GEMM). Our simulation framework can quantify the performance and energy efficiency of different MBA architectures for various applications. We validate our simulation framework with SPICE and evaluate the accuracy and performance of MBAs via several case studies. Experimental results demonstrate that the deviations of energy consumption and latency are only 0.47% and 0.49% on average compared with SPICE-based simulation.
items.abstract_zh: 基于忆阻器的加速器（MBA）已经证明了其在加速矩阵向量乘法（MVM）方面的能力，并且具有高性能和高能效。然而，很难确定应用程序是否以及如何从异构计算架构中的 MBA 中受益。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 MHSim 的模拟框架，用于评估使用 MBA 和 CPU 运行的应用程序的能效和性能。 MHSim 为设计人员提供灵活的系统级接口和电路级仿真模型来配置异构计算架构。我们设计了一个通用 MBA，它支持通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 的浮点计算模型。我们的模拟框架可以量化不同应用程序的不同 MBA 架构的性能和能源效率。我们使用 SPICE 验证我们的模拟框架，并通过几个案例研究评估 MBA 的准确性和表现。实验结果表明，与基于SPICE的仿真相比，能耗和延迟的偏差平均仅为0.47%和0.49%。

items.title: feGRASS: Fast and Effective Graph Spectral Sparsification for Scalable Power Grid Analysis.
items.abstract: Graph spectral sparsification aims to find a ultrasparse subgraph which can preserve the spectral properties of the original graph. The subgraph can be leveraged to construct a preconditioner to speed up the solution of the original graph’s Laplacian matrix. In this work, we propose feGRASS, a fast and effective graph spectral sparsification approach for the problem of large-scale power grid analysis and other problems with similar graphs. The proposed approach is based on two novel concepts: 1) effective edge weight and 2) spectral edge similarity. The former takes advantage of node degrees and breadth-first-search (BFS) distances, which leads to a scalable algorithm for generating low-stretch spanning trees (LSSTs). Then, the latter concept is leveraged during the recovery of spectrally critical off-tree edges to produce spectrally similar subgraphs. Compared with the most recent competitor [1] , the proposed approach is much faster for producing high-quality spectral sparsifiers. Extensive experimental results have been demonstrated to illustrate the superior efficiency of a preconditioned conjugate gradient (PCG) algorithm based on the proposed approach, for solving large power grid problems and many other real-world graph Laplacians. For instance, a power grid matrix with 60 million unknowns and 260 million nonzeros can be solved (at a 1E-3 accuracy level) within 196 s and 12 PCG iterations, on a single CPU core.
items.abstract_zh: 图谱稀疏化的目的是找到一个能够保留原始图谱特性的超稀疏子图。可以利用子图构建预处理器来加速原始图拉普拉斯矩阵的求解。在这项工作中，我们提出了 feGRASS，一种快速有效的图谱稀疏化方法，用于解决大规模电网分析问题和其他具有类似图的问题。所提出的方法基于两个新颖的概念：1）有效边缘权重和2）谱边缘相似度。前者利用节点度和广度优先搜索 (BFS) 距离，从而产生用于生成低伸展生成树 (LSST) 的可扩展算法。然后，在恢复光谱关键的离树边缘期间利用后一个概念来生成光谱相似的子图。与最新的竞争对手 [1] 相比，所提出的方法可以更快地生成高质量的光谱稀疏器。大量的实验结果表明，基于所提出的方法的预条件共轭梯度（PCG）算法在解决大型电网问题和许多其他现实世界的图拉普拉斯问题方面具有卓越的效率。例如，具有 6000 万个未知数和 2.6 亿个非零值的电网矩阵可以在 196 秒和 12 个 PCG 迭代内，在单个 CPU 内核上求解（精度为 1E-3 级别）。

items.title: CARTAD: Compiler-Assisted Reinforcement Learning for Thermal-Aware Task Scheduling and DVFS on Multicores.
items.abstract: As the power density of modern CPUs is gradually increasing, thermal management has become one of the primary concerns for multicore systems, where task scheduling and dynamic voltage/frequency scaling (DVFS) play a pivotal role in effectively managing the system temperature. In this article, we propose CARTAD , a new reinforcement learning (RL)-based task scheduling and DVFS method for temperature minimization and latency guarantee on multicore systems. The novelty of CARTAD framework is that we exploit the machine learning technique to analyze the applications’ intermediate representations (IRs) generated by a compiler and identify an important feature which is critical for predicting the application’s performance. With the newly explored feature, we construct an RL-based scheduler with the more effective state representation and reward function such that the system temperature can be minimized while guaranteeing applications’ latency. We implement and evaluate CARTAD on real platforms in comparison with the state-of-the-art approaches. Experimental results show CARTAD can reduce the maximum temperature by up to 16 °C and the average temperature by up to 10 °C.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现代CPU的功率密度逐渐增加，热管理已成为多核系统的主要关注点之一，其中任务调度和动态电压/频率调节（DVFS）在有效管理系统温度方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们提出了 CARTAD ，这是一种新的基于强化学习 (RL) 的任务调度和 DVFS 方法，用于多核系统上的温度最小化和延迟保证。 CARTAD 框架的新颖之处在于，我们利用机器学习技术来分析编译器生成的应用程序的中间表示 (IR)，并识别对于预测应用程序性能至关重要的重要特征。利用新探索的功能，我们构建了一个基于强化学习的调度器，具有更有效的状态表示和奖励函数，从而可以在保证应用程序延迟的同时最大限度地降低系统温度。我们在真实平台上实施并评估 CARTAD ，并与最先进的方法进行比较。实验结果表明 CARTAD 可降低最高温度达16℃，平均温度达10℃。

items.title: Timing-Aware Layer Assignment for Advanced Process Technologies Considering via Pillars.
items.abstract: Interconnect delay is a key factor that affects the chip performance in layer assignment. Particularly in the advanced process technologies of 5 nm and beyond, interconnect delay has grown significantly due to the increase of circuit scale. Moreover, coupling effect existed in wires reduces the accuracy of delay evaluation. On the other hand, the size of vias is often ignored in layer assignment, which enlarges the mismatch between global routing and detailed routing. To solve these problems, we propose VPT , a timing-aware layer assignment algorithm considering via pillars, which includes the following five key techniques: 1) via pillar structure combined with nondefault-rule (NDR) wires is adopted to form a net delay optimization system for advanced process technologies; 2) a synthetical model that can adapt to varying types and sizes of both vias and wires is designed to evaluate overflow effectively; 3) a sorting strategy is devised to reduce uncertainty of layer assignment flow and improve stability of the proposed algorithm; 4) an awareness strategy based on multiaspect congestion assessment is designed to reduce overflow significantly; and 5) a net scalpel algorithm is devised to minimize the maximum delay of nets, so that the timing behaviors can be improved systematically. The experimental results on multiple benchmarks confirm that the proposed algorithm leads to lower delay and less overflow, while achieving the best solution quality among the existing algorithms with the shortest runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 互连延迟是影响芯片层分配性能的关键因素。特别是在5nm及以上的先进工艺技术中，由于电路规模的增大，互连延迟显着增长。此外，线路中存在的耦合效应降低了时延评估的准确性。另一方面，在层分配中常常忽略过孔的尺寸，这扩大了全局布线和详细布线之间的不匹配。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 VPT ，一种考虑过孔支柱的时序感知层分配算法，其中包括以下五个关键技术：1）采用过孔支柱结构与非默认规则（NDR）线相结合，形成先进的网络延迟优化系统。工艺技术； 2）设计了能够适应不同类型和尺寸的过孔和导线的综合模型，以有效评估溢出； 3）设计了排序策略，以减少层分配流程的不确定性，提高算法的稳定性； 4）设计基于多方面拥塞评估的感知策略，以显着减少溢出； 5)设计了网络手术刀算法来最小化网络的最大延迟，从而可以系统地改进时序行为。多个基准测试的实验结果证实，所提出的算法具有更低的延迟和更少的溢出，同时以最短的运行时间实现了现有算法中最好的解质量。

items.title: IVQ: In-Memory Acceleration of DNN Inference Exploiting Varied Quantization.
items.abstract: Weight quantization is well adapted to cope with the ever-growing complexity of the deep neural network (DNN) model. Diversified quantization schemes lead to diverse quantized bit width and formats of the weights, thereby, subject to different hardware implementations. Such variety prevents a general NPU to leverage different quantization schemes to gain performance and energy efficiency. More importantly, a trend of quantization diversity emerges that applies multiple quantization schemes to different fine-grained structures (e.g., a layer or a channel of weight) of a DNN. Therefore, a general architecture is desired to exploit varied quantization schemes. The crossbar-based processing-in-memory (PIM) architecture, a promising DNN accelerator, is well known for its highly efficient matrix-vector multiplication. However, PIM suffers from the inflexible intracrossbar data path because the weight is stationary on the crossbar and binds to the “add” operation along the bitline. Therefore, many nonuniform quantization methods must rollback the quantization before mapping the weights onto the crossbar. Counterintuitively, this article discovers a unique opportunity of the PIM architecture to exploit varied quantization schemes. We first transform the quantization diversity problem into a consistency problem by aligning the bit with the same magnitude along the same bitline of the crossbar. Consequently, such naive weight mapping causes many square hollows of idle PIM cells. We then propose a novel spatial mapping to exempt these “hollow” crossbar from the intercrossbar data path. To further squeeze the weights on fewer crossbars, we decouple the intracrossbar data path from the hardware bitline by a novel temporal scheduling, so that bits with different magnitudes can be placed on cells along the same bitline. Finally, the proposed IVQ includes a temporal pipeline to avoid the introduced stalling cycles, and a data flow with delicate control mechanisms for the new intra and intercrossbar data paths. Putting all together, IVQ achieves 19.7× , 10.7× , 4.7× \sim 63.4× , 91.7× speedup, and 17.7× , 5.1× , 5.7× \sim 68.1× , 541× energy savings over two PIM accelerators (ISAAC and CASCADE), two customized quantization accelerators (based on ASIC and FPGA), and NVIDIA RTX 2080 GPU, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 权重量化非常适合应对深度神经网络（DNN）模型日益增长的复杂性。多样化的量化方案导致量化位宽和权重格式多样化，从而受到不同硬件实现的影响。这种多样性阻碍了通用 NPU 利用不同的量化方案来获得性能和能源效率。更重要的是，出现了量化多样性的趋势，将多种量化方案应用于 DNN 的不同细粒度结构（例如权重层或通道）。因此，需要一种通用架构来利用各种量化方案。基于交叉开关的内存处理 (PIM) 架构是一种很有前途的 DNN 加速器，以其高效的矩阵向量乘法而闻名。然而，PIM 受到不灵活的交叉开关内数据路径的影响，因为权重在交叉开关上是固定的，并且绑定到沿位线的“添加”操作。因此，许多非均匀量化方法必须在将权重映射到交叉开关之前回滚量化。与直觉相反，本文发现了 PIM 架构利用各种量化方案的独特机会。我们首先通过沿着交叉开关的相同位线对齐具有相同幅度的位，将量化多样性问题转化为一致性问题。因此，这种简单的权重映射会导致空闲 PIM 信元出现许多方形空洞。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的空间映射，以将这些“空心”交叉开关从交叉开关间数据路径中免除。为了进一步压缩更少交叉开关上的权重，我们通过新颖的时间调度将交叉开关内数据路径与硬件位线解耦，以便可以将具有不同幅度的位放置在沿着相同位线的单元上。最后，所提出的 IVQ 包括一个临时管道，以避免引入的停顿周期，以及一个具有用于新的内部和间交叉数据路径的精细控制机制的数据流。综合起来，IVQ 实现了 19.7× , 10.7× , 4.7× \sim 63.4× , 91.7× 加速，以及 17.7× , 5.1× , 5.7× \sim 68.1× , 541× 比两个 PIM 加速器（ISAAC 和 CASCADE）、两个定制量化加速器（基于 ASIC 和FPGA）和 NVIDIA RTX 2080 GPU。

items.title: EDC: An Elastic Data Cache to Optimizing the I/O Performance in Deduplicated SSDs.
items.abstract: Data deduplication is widely deployed in solid-state drives (SSDs) to improve the storage space utilization and alleviate the endurance issue. However, deduplication increases the degree of fragmentation and the access contention, significantly hurting the system performance. First, the fragmentation at the storage medium level in SSD is closely related to the internal parallelism, and the degree of fragmentation increases as the degree of the parallelism decreases. Deduplication removes the duplicate parts of the write sequences, decreasing the read parallelism. Thus, the degree of fragmentation is increased, eventually degrading the read performance. Second, the uneven distribution of the highly referenced data increases the access contention. This increased access contention prolongs the queueing time, further degrading the system performance. Motivated by our observations, we propose an elastic data cache (EDC) to improve the I/O performance in the deduplicated SSD. EDC redesigns the built-in DRAM-based data cache, tracks the popular and highly-referenced data, and maintains them in the cache. To fulfill the novel data cache, EDC changes the request process. The read requests that access the fragments in the flash memory are mostly performed in the fast-speed data cache, alleviating the negative impact of fragmentation on the read performance. The reduced read accesses to the flash memory also ease the access contention, which improves the system performance significantly. Extensive experimental results validate the efficiency of EDC, showing that it effectively improves the read performance and the write performance by up to 79% and 85% on average, respectively, in the deduplicated SSD.
items.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除广泛应用于固态硬盘（SSD）中，以提高存储空间利用率并缓解耐用性问题。然而，重复数据删除增加了碎片程度和访问争用，严重损害了系统性能。首先，SSD中存储介质层面的碎片与内部并行度密切相关，随着并行度的降低，碎片程度也随之增加。重复数据删除会删除写入序列的重复部分，从而降低读取并行性。因此，碎片程度增加，最终降低读取性能。其次，高引用数据的分布不均匀增加了访问争用。这种增加的访问争用延长了排队时间，进一步降低了系统性能。受我们观察的启发，我们提出了一种弹性数据缓存（EDC）来提高重复数据删除 SSD 中的 I/O 性能。 EDC重新设计了内置的基于DRAM的数据缓存，跟踪流行的和高引用的数据，并将它们维护在缓存中。为了实现新颖的数据缓存，EDC改变了请求流程。访问闪存中碎片的读请求大部分在高速数据缓存中执行，减轻了碎片对读取性能的负面影响。减少对闪存的读取访问也缓解了访问争用，从而显着提高了系统性能。大量的实验结果验证了EDC的效率，表明它有效地提高了重复数据删除SSD的读取性能和写入性能，平均分别高达79%和85%。

items.title: Topological Structure and Physical Layout Co-Design for Wavelength-Routed Optical Networks-on-Chip.
items.abstract: The wavelength-routed optical network on chip (WRONoC) is a promising solution for signal transmission in modern System-on-Chip (SoC) designs. Previous works do not simultaneously handle all the following four main issues for WRONoCs: 1) correlations between the topological structure and physical layout; 2) tradeoffs between the maximum insertion loss and the number of wavelengths; 3) runtime scalability of wavelength assignment scheme; and 4) a fully automated flow to generate predictable designs. As a result, their insertion loss estimation is inaccurate, their wavelength assignment is inefficient, and thus, only suboptimal results are obtained. To remedy these disadvantages, we present a fully automated topological structure and a physical layout co-design flow with improved wavelength assignment schemes to minimize the maximum insertion loss and the laser power simultaneously with a significant speedup. The experimental results show that our co-design flow significantly outperforms state-of-the-art works in the maximum insertion loss, laser power, and runtimes.
items.abstract_zh: 波长路由片上光网络 (WRONoC) 是现代片上系统 (SoC) 设计中信号传输的一种很有前景的解决方案。以前的工作并没有同时处理WRONoC的以下四个主要问题：1）拓扑结构和物理布局之间的相关性； 2）最大插入损耗和波长数量之间的权衡； 3)波长分配方案的运行时可扩展性； 4) 生成可预测设计的全自动流程。结果，它们的插入损耗估计不准确，它们的波长分配效率低下，因此只能获得次优结果。为了弥补这些缺点，我们提出了一种完全自动化的拓扑结构和物理布局协同设计流程，以及改进的波长分配方案，以最小化最大插入损耗和激光功率，同时显着加速。实验结果表明，我们的协同设计流程在最大插入损耗、激光功率和运行时间方面显着优于最先进的工作。

items.title: Morphling: A Reconfigurable Architecture for Tensor Computation.
items.abstract: Tensor algebra plays a major role in various applications, including data analysis, machine learning, and hydrodynamics simulation. Different tensor algebra inherently varies in dimension, size, and computation, leading to different execution preference, including parallelization, data arrangement, and accumulation. Another critical aspect for tensor algebra is the involved tensors can be with varying mixes of dense and sparse representation. Such diversified applications are notoriously difficult to accelerate. Prior ASIC architectures do not meet the needs due to fixed dataflow and prior fine-grained fabrics (e.g., FPGAs) solutions offer limited performance and power improvement due to bit-level reconfigurable structure. In this article, we propose Morphling, a reconfigurable architecture that can flexibly handle both dense and sparse tensor computation. We first generalize a flexible execution model that decomposes tensor operations into three steps, including tensor vectorization, vector computation, and output reduction. The dense and sparse tensor computation share the same execution model, but differ in the vector computation step where the multiplications are conducted. Depending on the number of inputs and outputs that are linked together in the computation step, we define three parallel patterns, including many-to-one, one-to-many, and one-to-one, which correspond to different implementations for dense and sparse computation. Furthermore, to efficiently support sparse tensor, we design a tiled-BCSR format that enables high parallelism and balanced workload. At the architecture level, we propose a reconfigurable design to support the execution model. The hardware units can be reconfigured to support different datapath and enable different types of data reuse. We evaluate Morphling using various tensor operations and compare it with CPU, GPU, FPGA, and state-of-the-art ASIC designs. Overall, Morphling achieves 13.4X, 677.7X, 44.7X energy efficiency over Xilinx ZC706 FPGA, Intel i7-9700K CPU, and NVIDIA TitanX GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 张量代数在各种应用中发挥着重要作用，包括数据分析、机器学习和流体动力学模拟。不同的张量代数在维度、大小和计算方面本质上是不同的，导致不同的执行偏好，包括并行化、数据排列和累积。张量代数的另一个关键方面是所涉及的张量可以具有不同的密集和稀疏表示的混合。众所周知，这种多样化的应用很难加速。先前的 ASIC 架构由于固定的数据流而无法满足需求，而先前的细粒度结构（例如 FPGA）解决方案由于位级可重构结构而提供有限的性能和功耗改进。在本文中，我们提出了 Morphling，一种可重构架构，可以灵活处理密集和稀疏张量计算。我们首先概括了一个灵活的执行模型，将张量运算分解为三个步骤，包括张量向量化、向量计算和输出缩减。密集和稀疏张量计算共享相同的执行模型，但进行乘法的向量计算步骤不同。根据计算步骤中链接在一起的输入和输出的数量，我们定义了三种并行模式，包括多对一、一对多和一对一，它们对应于密集和稀疏计算的不同实现。此外，为了有效支持稀疏张量，我们设计了一种平铺 BCSR 格式，可实现高并行性和平衡工作负载。在架构层面，我们提出了可重构的设计来支持执行模型。硬件单元可以重新配置以支持不同的数据路径并实现不同类型的数据重用。我们使用各种张量运算来评估 Morphling，并将其与 CPU、GPU、FPGA 和最先进的 ASIC 设计进行比较。总体而言，Morphling 的能效比 Xilinx ZC706 FPGA、Intel i7-9700K CPU 和 NVIDIA TitanX GPU 分别提高了 13.4 倍、677.7 倍和 44.7 倍。

items.title: A Clock Tree Prediction and Optimization Framework Using Generative Adversarial Learning.
items.abstract: Modern physical design flows highly depend on design space exploration to find the commercial tools’ clock tree synthesis (CTS) parameters that lead to optimized clock trees. However, such exploration is often time-consuming and computationally inefficient. In this article, we overcome this drawback by proposing a novel framework named GAN-CTS, which utilizes conditional generative adversarial network (GAN) to predict and optimize CTS outcomes. Our framework is built upon three sequential learning stages. First, to precisely characterize distinct designs, we leverage transfer learning to extract netlist features directly from placement images. Second, we perform regression learning using various methods to predict the target CTS outcomes and demonstrate that the proposed multitask learning approach achieves better accuracy than the meta-modeling method adopted by previous works. To fully benefit from the predictions made by our framework, we further quantitatively interpret the importance of each CTS input parameter subject to various design objectives through attribution-based learning. Finally, generative adversarial learning is leveraged to optimize the target clock metrics with the guidance provided by the pretrained regression model. To substantiate the generality of our framework, we perform validations on four unseen netlists that are not utilized in the training process. The experimental results conducted on real-world designs demonstrate that our framework: 1) achieves an average prediction error of 3%; 2) improves the commercial tool’s auto-generated clock tree by 20.7% in clock power, 21.5% in clock wirelength, 36.1% in the worst skew; and 3) reaches an F1-score of 0.93 in the classification task of determining successful and failed CTS runs.
items.abstract_zh: 现代物理设计流程高度依赖于设计空间探索，以找到商业工具的时钟树综合 (CTS) 参数，从而优化时钟树。然而，这种探索通常非常耗时且计算效率低下。在本文中，我们通过提出一种名为 GAN-CTS 的新颖框架克服了这一缺陷，该框架利用条件生成对抗网络 (GAN) 来预测和优化 CTS 结果。我们的框架建立在三个连续的学习阶段之上。首先，为了精确表征不同的设计，我们利用迁移学习直接从布局图像中提取网表特征。其次，我们使用各种方法进行回归学习来预测目标 CTS 结果，并证明所提出的多任务学习方法比以前的工作采用的元建模方法具有更好的准确性。为了充分受益于我们的框架所做的预测，我们通过基于归因的学习进一步定量解释了每个 CTS 输入参数对各种设计目标的重要性。最后，在预训练回归模型提供的指导下，利用生成对抗性学习来优化目标时钟指标。为了证实我们框架的通用性，我们对训练过程中未使用的四个看不见的网表进行验证。对现实世界设计进行的实验结果表明，我们的框架：1）实现了 3% 的平均预测误差； 2）将商业工具的自动生成时钟树的时钟功率提高了20.7%，时钟线长提高了21.5%，最差偏差提高了36.1%； 3) 在确定 CTS 运行成功和失败的分类任务中达到 0.93 的 F1 分数。

items.title: A Machine Learning-Powered Tier Partitioning Methodology for Monolithic 3-D ICs.
items.abstract: Tier partitioning is one of the most critical stages in monolithic 3-D (M3D) integrated circuits (ICs) implementation flows. It transforms 2-D netlists into 3-D by performing tier assignment for each design instance, which directly impacts the power, performance, and area (PPA) metrics of final 3-D full-chip designs. However, the current state-of-the-art tier partitioning approach named bin-based min-cut algorithm has fundamental flaws that lead to severe drawbacks, such as timing degradation, 3-D routing overhead, and redundant monolithic intertier vias (MIVs) insertion. To overcome these issues, in this article, we propose TP-GNN, an unsupervised graph learning-based tier partitioning framework that utilizes graph neural networks (GNNs) and advanced machine learning (ML) techniques to perform tier partitioning. The proposed framework comprehends design- and technology-related parameters properly so that it is generalizable to various netlists and technologies. In addition, it can be integrated with any style of M3D design flows that require tier assignments of standard cells. In the experiments, we validate the proposed framework on seven industrial designs with two different fashions of M3D implementation flows: 1) partitioning-first (Snap3D) and 2) partitioning-last (Shrunk2D and Compact2D) flows. We demonstrate that our framework, TP-GNN, significantly improves the 3-D quality of results (QoR) across most testing designs in a large margin compared with the bin-based min-cut tier partitioning algorithm. Specifically, in OpenPiton, an RISC-V-based multicore system, we observe 27.4%, 7.7%, and 20.3% improvements in performance, wirelength, and energy-per-cycle, respectively. Finally, we perform a case study by applying the proposed framework to a heterogeneous M3D design flow, Pin3D, on a commercial CPU design and observe that TP-GNN reaches better partitioning solutions than the existing partitioning approaches for heterogeneous 3-D ICs.
items.abstract_zh: 层划分是单片 3D (M3D) 集成电路 (IC) 实现流程中最关键的阶段之一。它通过为每个设计实例执行层分配将 2D 网表转换为 3D，这直接影响最终 3D 全芯片设计的功耗、性能和面积 (PPA) 指标。然而，当前最先进的层划分方法（称为基于 bin 的最小切割算法）存在根本性缺陷，会导致严重的缺陷，例如时序退化、3D 布线开销和冗余单片层间过孔 (MIV) 插入。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了 TP-GNN，这是一种基于无监督图学习的分层框架，利用图神经网络 (GNN) 和高级机器学习 (ML) 技术来执行分层划分。所提出的框架正确理解了设计和技术相关的参数，因此可以推广到各种网表和技术。此外，它还可以与任何需要标准单元层分配的 M3D 设计流程集成。在实验中，我们使用两种不同方式的 M3D 实现流程在七种工业设计上验证了所提出的框架：1）先分区（Snap3D）和 2）后分区（Shrunk2D 和 Compact2D）流程。我们证明，与基于 bin 的最小切割层划分算法相比，我们的框架 TP-GNN 显着提高了大多数测试设计的 3D 结果质量 (QoR)。具体来说，在基于 RISC-V 的多核系统 OpenPiton 中，我们观察到性能、线长和每周期能耗分别提高了 27.4%、7.7% 和 20.3%。最后，我们通过将所提出的框架应用于商用 CPU 设计上的异构 M3D 设计流程 Pin3D 来进行案例研究，并观察到 ​​TP-GNN 比异构 3-D IC 的现有分区方法获得了更好的分区解决方案。

items.title: On-Chip Optical Routing With Provably Good Algorithms for Path Clustering and Assignment.
items.abstract: As the VLSI technology continues to scale down, combined with increasing demands for large bandwidth and low-power consumption, the optical interconnections with wavelength-division multiplexing (WDM) become an attractive alternative for on-chip signal transmission. Previous WDM-aware optical routing works consist of three main drawbacks: they are based mainly on heuristics or restricted integer linear programming to handle optical routing, the addressed types of insertion loss, and WDM overheads are incomplete, and the crosstalk noise during concurrent signal transmission is neglected. As a result, no performance guarantees can be achieved on their WDM clustering results, the reliability of the optical network is impaired, and/or their computations are too time consuming. To remedy these disadvantages, we present a new WDM-aware optical routing flow to minimize the insertion loss, the WDM overheads, and the crosstalk noise with a significant speedup. In the proposed flow, the WDM-aware path clustering algorithm guarantees to find an optimal solution for 1-, 2-, and 3-path clustering and has the constant performance bound for most cases of 4-path clustering; the crosstalk-aware path assignment guarantees to minimize the number of crosstalk signal pairs within the given displacement bound. Experimental results based on the ISPD 2007 and 2019 contest benchmarks and a real optical design show that our optical router significantly outperforms published works in wirelength, insertion loss, wavelength power, crosstalk noise, and runtimes.
items.abstract_zh: 随着VLSI技术不断缩小尺寸，加上对大带宽和低功耗的需求不断增加，波分复用（WDM）光互连成为片上信号传输的有吸引力的替代方案。以前的WDM感知光路由工作存在三个主要缺点：它们主要基于启发式或受限整数线性规划来处理光路由，所解决的插入损耗类型和WDM开销不完整，并且忽略了并发信号传输期间的串扰噪声。结果，他们的WDM聚类结果无法实现性能保证，光网络的可靠性受到损害，和/或他们的计算太耗时。为了弥补这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的 WDM 感知光路由流程，以最大限度地减少插入损耗、WDM 开销和串扰噪声，并显着加速。在所提出的流程中，WDM感知路径聚类算法保证找到1、2和3路径聚类的最优解决方案，并且对于4路径聚类的大多数情况具有恒定的性能界限；串扰感知路径分配保证在给定位移范围内最小化串扰信号对的数量。基于 ISPD 2007 和 2019 竞赛基准和真实光学设计的实验结果表明，我们的光路由器在线长、插入损耗、波长功率、串扰噪声和运行时间方面显着优于已发表的作品。

items.title: Designing Efficient DNNs via Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search and Beyond.
items.abstract: Hardware systems integrated with deep neural networks (DNNs) are deemed to pave the way for future artificial intelligence (AI). However, manually designing efficient DNNs involves nontrivial computation resources since significant trial-and-errors are required to finalize the network configuration. To this end, we, in this article, introduce a novel hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) framework, namely, GoldenNAS, to automate the design of efficient DNNs. To begin with, we present a novel technique, called dynamic channel scaling, to enable the channel-level search since the number of channels has non-negligible impacts on both accuracy and efficiency. Besides, we introduce an efficient progressive space shrinking method to raise the awareness of the search space toward target hardware and alleviate the search overheads as well. Moreover, we propose an effective hardware performance modeling method to approximate the runtime latency of DNNs upon target hardware, which is further integrated into GoldenNAS to avoid the tedious on-device measurements. Then, we employ the evolutionary algorithm (EA) to search for the optimal operator/channel configurations of DNNs, denoted as GoldenNets. Finally, to enable the depthwise adaptiveness of GoldenNets under dynamic environments, we propose the adaptive batch normalization (ABN) technique, followed by the self-knowledge distillation (SKD) approach to improve the accuracy of adaptive subnetworks. We conduct extensive experiments directly on ImageNet, which clearly demonstrate the advantages of GoldenNAS over existing state-of-the-art approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 与深度神经网络（DNN）集成的硬件系统被认为为未来的人工智能（AI）铺平了道路。然而，手动设计高效的 DNN 需要大量的计算资源，因为需要大量的试错才能最终确定网络配置。为此，我们在本文中介绍了一种新颖的硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 框架，即 GoldenNAS，以自动化高效 DNN 的设计。首先，我们提出了一种称为动态通道缩放的新技术，以实现通道级搜索，因为通道数量对准确性和效率都有不可忽视的影响。此外，我们引入了一种有效的渐进空间收缩方法，以提高搜索空间对目标硬件的感知并减轻搜索开销。此外，我们提出了一种有效的硬件性能建模方法来近似目标硬件上 DNN 的运行时延迟，该方法进一步集成到 GoldenNAS 中以避免繁琐的设备上测量。然后，我们采用进化算法（EA）来搜索 DNN 的最佳算子/通道配置，表示为 GoldenNet。最后，为了实现动态环境下 GoldenNet 的深度自适应，我们提出了自适应批量归一化（ABN）技术，然后采用自知识蒸馏（SKD）方法来提高自适应子网络的准确性。我们直接在 ImageNet 上进行了广泛的实验，这清楚地证明了 GoldenNAS 相对于现有最先进方法的优势。

items.title: NC-Net: Efficient Neuromorphic Computing Using Aggregated Subnets on a Crossbar-Based Architecture With Nonvolatile Memory.
items.abstract: Neuromorphic computing chips consisting of crossbar arrays of emergent nonvolatile memory (NVM) have the potential of achieving both high energy efficiency and throughput as the low-power implementation of convolutional neural network (CNN) inference engines. However, such hardware has design constraints, such as its limited fan-in/fan-out and resource-inefficient mapping, that make the design and deployment of CNN on them challenging. As a result, the user has to design the CNN model with intricate knowledge of the hardware architecture and even cannot fit the models in the hardware for CNN with high resolution image input. In this article, we propose the use of aggregated subnets , NC-net, which is a constrained form of the traditional layer structure, to solve these issues. With our method, we put forward an energy-efficient buffer- and analogue-to-digital converter and digital-to-analogue converter (ADC/DAC)-free architecture and a scalable end-to-end solution that automatically satisfies the hardware constraints of crossbar architectures, while optimizing the resource usage. In our solution, the exploration and deployment of a CNN for a neuromorphic crossbar hardware start with a design front end based on TensorFlow . Our automated design flow maps the NC-net network from TensorFlow to the crossbar architecture. We tested our designs on both a simulator and a field-programmable gate array (FPGA) emulator with various benchmarks. In addition to general benchmarks, including MNIST, SVHN, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, we tested our system on a real-world application, human detection with high resolution (224 × 224) images as the input. Our system achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy for these benchmarks on the crossbar-based neuromorphic hardware, with an accuracy of more than 90% for the latter. It also yielded up to 4.25× improvement in the efficiency of spiking core usage compared to TrueNorth.
items.abstract_zh: 由新兴非易失性存储器 (NVM) 交叉阵列组成的神经形态计算芯片作为卷积神经网络 (CNN) 推理引擎的低功耗实现，具有实现高能效和吞吐量的潜力。然而，此类硬件存在设计限制，例如有限的扇入/扇出和资源效率低下的映射，这使得 CNN 在其上的设计和部署具有挑战性。因此，用户必须具有复杂的硬件架构知识来设计 CNN 模型，甚至无法将模型适合于具有高分辨率图像输入的 CNN 硬件中。在本文中，我们建议使用聚合子网（NC-net）（传统层结构的一种约束形式）来解决这些问题。通过我们的方法，我们提出了一种节能的无缓冲器、模数转换器和数模转换器（ADC/DAC）架构以及可扩展的端到端解决方案，可自动满足交叉开关架构的硬件限制，同时优化资源使用。在我们的解决方案中，针对神经形态交叉开关硬件的 CNN 的探索和部署从基于 TensorFlow 的设计前端开始。我们的自动化设计流程将 NC-net 网络从 TensorFlow 映射到 crossbar 架构。我们在模拟器和现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 模拟器上使用各种基准测试了我们的设计。除了包括 MNIST、SVHN、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 在内的一般基准测试之外，我们还在真实应用程序、高分辨率人体检测上测试了我们的系统 (224 × 224) 图像作为输入。我们的系统在基于交叉开关的神经拟态硬件上实现了这些基准测试的最先进的精度，后者的精度超过 90%。与 TrueNorth 相比，它还使尖峰核心使用效率提高了 4.25× 。

items.title: Tail Latency Optimization for LDPC-Based High-Density and Low-Cost Flash Memory Devices.
items.abstract: Flash memory has been developed with bit density improvement, technology scaling, and 3-D stacking. With this trend, its reliability has been significantly degraded. Error correction code (ECC), such as low-density parity code (LDPC), which has strong error correction capability, has been deployed to solve this problem. However, one of the critical issues of LDPC is that it would introduce a long decoding latency on devices with low reliability. In this case, tail latency would happen, which will significantly impact the quality of service. In this work, a set of smart refresh schemes is proposed to optimize the tail latency. The basic idea of the work is to refresh data when the accessed data have a long decoding latency. Two smart refresh schemes are proposed for this work. The first refresh scheme is designed to refresh data with a long access latency when they are accessed several times. The second refresh scheme is designed to periodically check data with an extremely long access latency and refresh them. To further optimize the refresh overhead caused by the above refresh schemes, a dual-ECC-based refresh scheme is proposed. Besides, a mathematical model for all proposed schemes is constructed to clarify the benefit of each scheme. The experimental results show that the proposed schemes can significantly improve the tail latency with acceptable overhead. What is more, the access performance is well maintained compared with the state-of-the-art work.
items.abstract_zh: 闪存的发展伴随着位密度的提高、技术的扩展和 3D 堆叠。随着这种趋势，其可靠性已显着下降。纠错码（ECC），例如具有强大纠错能力的低密度奇偶校验码（LDPC），已经被用来解决这个问题。然而，LDPC 的关键问题之一是它会在可靠性较低的设备上引入较长的解码延迟。在这种情况下，会出现尾延迟，这将严重影响服务质量。在这项工作中，提出了一组智能刷新方案来优化尾部延迟。该工作的基本思想是当访问的数据解码延迟较长时刷新数据。这项工作提出了两种智能刷新方案。第一种刷新方案旨在刷新数据，当数据被多次访问时，访问延迟较长。第二种刷新方案旨在定期检查访问延迟极长的数据并刷新它们。为了进一步优化上述刷新方案带来的刷新开销，提出了基于双ECC的刷新方案。此外，还为所有提出的方案构建了数学模型，以阐明每个方案的优点。实验结果表明，所提出的方案可以在可接受的开销下显着改善尾部延迟。更重要的是，与最先进的工作相比，访问性能保持得很好。

items.title: SCAR: Security Compliance Analysis and Resynthesis of Reconfigurable Scan Networks.
items.abstract: Reconfigurable scan networks (RSNs) enable an efficient reliability management throughout the device lifetime. They can be used for controlling integrated instruments, such as aging monitors or built-in self-test (BIST) registers, as well as for collecting the evaluation results from them. At the same time, they may impose a security threat, since the additional connectivities introduced by the RSN can possibly be misused as a side channel. This article presents an approach for security compliance analysis and resynthesis (SCAR) of RSNs to integrate an RSN compliant with the security properties of the initial design. First, the reachability properties of the original design are accurately computed. The connectivities inside the RSN, which exceed the allowed connectivity of the initial design, are identified using the presented security compliance analysis. Next, all violations are resolved by automated Resynthesis with a minimized number of structural changes. As a result of SCAR, any information leakage due to the RSN integration is prevented, while the accessibility of the instruments through the RSN is preserved. The approach is able to analyze complex control dependencies and obtains a compliant RSN even for the largest available benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 可重新配置的扫描网络 (RSN) 可在整个设备生命周期内实现高效的可靠性管理。它们可用于控制集成仪器，例如老化监视器或内置自测试（BIST）寄存器，以及收集它们的评估结果。同时，它们可能会带来安全威胁，因为 RSN 引入的额外连接可能会被滥用为侧通道。本文提出了一种对 RSN 进行安全合规性分析和重新合成 (SCAR) 的方法，以将符合初始设计安全属性的 RSN 集成起来。首先，准确计算原始设计的可达性属性。 RSN 内部的连接超出了初始设计允许的连接，使用所提供的安全合规性分析来识别。接下来，所有违规行为均通过自动重新合成以最少的结构变化来解决。 SCAR 的结果是，可以防止由于 RSN 集成而导致的任何信息泄漏，同时保留通过 RSN 对仪器的可访问性。该方法能够分析复杂的控制依赖性，并获得合规的 RSN，即使对于最大的可用基准也是如此。

items.title: Approximate Logic Synthesis Using Boolean Matrix Factorization.
items.abstract: Approximate computing is an emerging computing paradigm offering benefits in hardware metrics, such as design area and power consumption, by relaxing the requirement for full accuracy. In circuit design, a major challenge is to synthesize approximate circuits automatically from input exact circuits requiring minimal expert input. In this work, we present a method for approximate logic synthesis based on the Boolean matrix factorization, where an arbitrary input circuit can be approximated in a controlled fashion. Our methodology enables automatic computation of the dominant elements, bases , of the truth table of the circuit, and later combines the bases to approximate the original truth table. Such compression can reduce the complexity of the hardware implementation significantly, while introducing variable degrees of inaccuracy. Furthermore, in our approach, the factorization algorithm can be fine tuned as required by the application, to effectively improve control over degree of approximation. In this work, we provide a unified approach enabling the factorization algorithm to utilize semiring algebra, field algebra, and a combination of both for truth table factorization. In addition, we provide an automatic circuit partitioning approach and a design space exploration heuristic to navigate the search space. We implement our methodology using a full stack of open-source tools, and thoroughly evaluate our methodology on a number of representative circuits showcasing the benefits of our proposed methodology for approximate logic synthesis. Finally, we compare our methodology against an existing library of approximate designs and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
items.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种新兴的计算范例，通过放宽对完全精度的要求，在硬件指标（例如设计面积和功耗）方面提供优势。在电路设计中，一个主要挑战是从输入精确电路自动合成近似电路，需要最少的专家输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于布尔矩阵分解的近似逻辑综合方法，其中可以以受控方式近似任意输入电路。我们的方法能够自动计算电路真值表的主要元素 基数 ，然后组合这些基数以近似原始真值表。这种压缩可以显着降低硬件实现的复杂性，同时引入不同程度的不准确性。此外，在我们的方法中，分解算法可以根据应用的需要进行微调，以有效地提高对逼近程度的控制。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种统一的方法，使分解算法能够利用半环代数、域代数以及两者的组合进行真值表分解。此外，我们还提供自动电路分区方法和设计空间探索启发式来导航搜索空间。我们使用全套开源工具来实现我们的方法，并在许多代表性电路上彻底评估我们的方法，展示我们提出的近似逻辑综合方法的好处。最后，我们将我们的方法与现有的近似设计库进行比较，并展示最先进的性能。

items.title: DEVoT: Dynamic Delay Modeling of Functional Units Under Voltage and Temperature Variations.
items.abstract: Timing errors of microelectronic circuits occur when the circuit timing specification is violated, i.e., the dynamic delay of circuits exceeds the circuit clock period. With the continuous scaling of CMOS technology, microelectronic circuits are increasingly susceptible to microelectronic variations such as variations in operating conditions. Such variations can cause delay uncertainty in microelectronic circuits, leading to timing errors . Circuit designers typically combat these errors using conservative guardbands in the circuit and architectural design, which can, however, cause significant loss of operational efficiency. In this article, we propose DEVoT , a supervised learning model that can predict the dynamic delay of functional units (FUs) under different operating conditions, clock speeds, and input workload. The main contribution of DEVoT is to jointly consider the impact of voltage, temperature, and input workload in path sensitization, hence predicting the dynamic delay. We measure the dynamic delay using switching activity generated through gate-level simulation of post place-and-route design in the TSMC 45-nm process. We characterize the delay of FUs under different operating conditions and input workload. We then extract useful features in the input workload that influences dynamic path sensitization. Using these features, we apply supervised learning methods to build DEVoT . Across 100 different operating conditions, four widely used FUs, and three datasets, DEVoT achieves, on average, less than 2% relative deviation from the ground truth and is 100× faster than the gate-level simulation. We present two case studies using DEVoT . First, we use DEVoT to predict timing errors of FUs, and DEVoT achieves an average prediction accuracy at 98.04%. We further use DEVoT to estimate application output quality under different operating conditions, and DEVoT achieves an average estimation accuracy at 97% for two image processing applications. Second, we present a fuzzing-based method to identify “critical” patterns that can cause longer delay for a given circuit. Built on top of DEVoT , the generated input patterns can improve the sensitized delay by up to 8.3% compared to random patterns. DEVoT also outperforms automatic test pattern generation (ATPG) in sensitizing circuit delay. We will opensource DEVoT , which can assist circuit designers to perform early design space exploration and can also help software developers in approximate computing community to assess their program resilience to hardware approximation without performing circuit simulation.
items.abstract_zh: 当违反电路时序规范时，即电路的动态延迟超过电路时钟周期，微电子电路就会出现时序错误。随着 CMOS 技术的不断缩小，微电子电路越来越容易受到微电子变化的影响，例如工作条件的变化。这种变化可能会导致微电子电路中的延迟不确定性，从而导致 定时错误 。电路设计人员通常在电路和架构设计中使用保守的保护带来应对这些错误，但这可能会导致运行效率的显着损失。在本文中，我们提出了 DEVoT ，这是一种监督学习模型，可以预测功能单元（FU）在不同操作条件、时钟速度和输入工作负载下的动态延迟。 DEVoT 的主要贡献是联合考虑电压、温度和输入工作负载对路径敏化的影响，从而预测动态延迟。我们使用台积电 45 纳米工艺中布局布线后设计的门级仿真生成的开关活动来测量动态延迟。我们描述了不同操作条件和输入工作负载下 FU 的延迟。然后，我们在输入工作负载中提取影响动态路径敏感度的有用特征。利用这些功能，我们应用监督学习方法来构建 DEVoT 。在 100 种不同的操作条件、四种广泛使用的 FU 和三个数据集中， DEVoT 平均与地面实况的相对偏差小于 2%，并且是 100× 比门级模拟快。我们使用 DEVoT 提供两个案例研究。首先，我们使用 DEVoT 来预测 FU 的时序误差，以及 DEVoT 的平均预测精度为 98.04%。我们进一步使用 DEVoT 来估计不同操作条件下的应用程序输出质量，以及 DEVoT 对两个图像处理应用程序实现了 97% 的平均估计精度。其次，我们提出了一种基于模糊测试的方法来识别可能导致给定电路更长延迟的“关键”模式。生成的输入模式建立在 DEVoT 之上，与随机模式相比，可以将敏感延迟提高高达 8.3%。 DEVoT 在敏感电路延迟方面也优于自动测试模式生成 (ATPG)。我们将开源 DEVoT ，它可以帮助电路设计人员进行早期设计空间探索，也可以帮助近似计算社区的软件开发人员在不进行电路仿真的情况下评估其程序对硬件逼近的弹性。

items.title: Rebirth-FTL: Lifetime Optimization via Approximate Storage for NAND Flash Memory.
items.abstract: The lifetime of NAND flash cells significantly degrades with feature-size reductions and multilevel cell technology. On the other hand, we have more and more approximate data, such as images and videos that are more error tolerant than regular data like text. In this article, we propose Rebirth-FTL, which reuses faulty blocks that contain uncorrectable errors to store approximate data for lifetime optimization. Rebirth-FTL effectively manages two spaces, namely, the approximate space and the normal space, with an efficient address translator, a coordinated garbage collection, and a differential wear leveler. In addition, we develop an migration times restriction (MTR) policy to restrict the movement of the approximate data in the approximate space. We also develop a scheme to pass approximate information from userland to kernel space in Linux. Finally, a lifetime model is presented for lifetime analysis. Our experimental results show that Rebirth-FTL can extend the lifetime by 41.63% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 随着特征尺寸的减小和多级单元技术的发展，NAND 闪存单元的寿命显着降低。另一方面，我们拥有越来越多的近似数据，例如图像和视频，它们比文本等常规数据更具容错性。在本文中，我们提出了 Rebirth-FTL，它重用包含不可纠正错误的故障块来存储近似数据以进行生命周期优化。 Rebirth-FTL通过高效的地址转换器、协调的垃圾收集和差分磨损均衡器有效地管理两个空间，即近似空间和正常空间。此外，我们还制定了迁移次数限制（MTR）策略来限制近似数据在近似空间中的移动。我们还开发了一种在 Linux 中将近似信息从用户空间传递到内核空间的方案。最后，提出了用于寿命分析的寿命模型。我们的实验结果表明，Rebirth-FTL可以平均延长寿命41.63%。

items.title: MAID-Q: Minimizing Tail Latency in Embedded Flash With SMR Disk via -Learning Model.
items.abstract: As the mainstream solid-state storage technology, NAND flash has the advantages of tiny size, cost-effective, and high performance, which make it a promising candidate to be embedded into the shingled magnetic recording (SMR) disk to build a faster, denser, and cheaper storage system. However, such an embedded flash with SMR (EF-SMR) disk system suffers from lengthy tail-latency due to “reclamation issues” in both the NAND flash and the SMR disk. Our preliminary observations reveal that tremendous idle time intervals exist in real-world scenarios, and few prior works have focused on addressing the tail-latency issue in the EF-SMR disk. In this article, we propose a novel method termed MAID-Q to fully exploit the idle time intervals to minimize the lengthy tail-latency of the EF-SMR disk based on a lightweight reinforcement learning model (i.e., the Q -learning model). In addition, fine-grained block-level space management and a parallel reclamation strategy are proposed to improve the reclamation efficiency and hide the reclamation overheads. The effectiveness of our proposed design was evaluated with realistic I/O traces, and the results show that the proposed design can remedy the tail-latency by 88.31% and improve the overall performance by 79.03%.
items.abstract_zh: 作为主流的固态存储技术，NAND闪存具有体积小、成本低、性能高等优点，使其成为嵌入叠瓦式磁记录（SMR）磁盘中以构建更快、更密集、更便宜的存储系统的有希望的候选者。然而，这种带有SMR（EF-SMR）磁盘系统的嵌入式闪存由于NAND闪存和SMR磁盘中的“回收问题”而遭受较长的尾部延迟。我们的初步观察表明，现实场景中存在巨大的空闲时间间隔，并且之前很少有工作关注于解决 EF-SMR 磁盘中的尾部延迟问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 MAID-Q 的新颖方法，基于轻量级强化学习模型（即 Q -学习模型）。此外，提出了细粒度的块级空间管理和并行回收策略，以提高回收效率并隐藏回收开销。我们所提出的设计的有效性通过真实的 I/O 跟踪进行了评估，结果表明所提出的设计可以将尾部延迟纠正 88.31%，并将整体性能提高 79.03%。

items.title: RevSCA-2.0: SCA-Based Formal Verification of Nontrivial Multipliers Using Reverse Engineering and Local Vanishing Removal.
items.abstract: The formal verification of integer multipliers is one of the important but challenging problems in the verification community. Recently, the methods based on symbolic computer algebra (SCA) have shown very good results in comparison to all other existing proof techniques. However, when it comes to verification of huge and structurally complex multipliers, they completely fail as an explosion happens in the number of monomials. The reason for this explosion is the generation of redundant monomials known as vanishing monomials. This article introduces the SCA-based approach RevSCA-2.0 that combines reverse engineering and local vanishing removal to verify large and nontrivial multipliers. For our approach, we first come up with a theory for the origin of vanishing monomials, i.e., we prove that the gates/nodes where both outputs of half adders (HAs) converge are the origins of vanishing monomials. Then, we propose a dedicated reverse engineering technique to identify atomic blocks including HAs. The identified HAs are the basis for detecting converging cones and locally removing vanishing monomials, which finally results in a vanishing-free global backward rewriting. The efficiency of RevSCA-2.0 is demonstrated using an extensive set of multipliers with up to several million gates.
items.abstract_zh: 整数乘数的形式化验证是验证界重要但具有挑战性的问题之一。最近，与所有其他现有证明技术相比，基于符号计算机代数（SCA）的方法显示出了非常好的结果。然而，当涉及到庞大且结构复杂的乘法器的验证时，它们完全失败，因为单项式数量发生爆炸。这种爆炸的原因是生成了称为消失单项式的冗余单项式。本文介绍了基于 SCA 的方法 RevSCA-2.0，该方法结合了逆向工程和局部消失消除来验证大型且重要的乘数。对于我们的方法，我们首先提出消失单项式的起源理论，即我们证明半加法器（HA）的两个输出收敛的门/节点是消失单项式的起源。然后，我们提出了一种专用的逆向工程技术来识别包括 HA 的原子块。确定的 HA 是检测收敛锥体和局部消除消失单项式的基础，最终导致无消失的全局向后重写。 RevSCA-2.0 的效率通过使用具有多达数百万门的大量乘法器来证明。

items.title: A Scalable, Memory-Efficient Algorithm for Minimum Cycle Mean Calculation in Directed Graphs.
items.abstract: The concept of minimum cycle mean (MCM) in a directed graph has many applications in the design of circuits and systems. The algorithm by Young, Tarjan, and Orlin (YTO), when implemented with a binary heap, has been reported to be the fastest MCM algorithm in practice even when it has higher asymptotic time complexity than Karp’s algorithm. However, as an efficient implementation of YTO relies on data redundancy, its memory usage is higher and could be a prohibitive factor in large size problems. On the other hand, a typical implementation of Karp’s algorithm can also be memory hungry, thereby limiting its application to only small size problems. An early termination technique from Hartmann and Orlin (HO) can be directly applied to Karp’s algorithm to improve its runtime performance. The early termination also allows memory to be allocated on an on-demand basis, which can reduce the memory requirement of Karp’s algorithm. In our evaluation based on graphs constructed from IWLS 2005 benchmark circuits and randomly generated graphs, we empirically observe that the HO algorithm (or Karp’s algorithm with early termination technique from the HO algorithm) has much less memory usage than YTO, but it lags behind YTO in runtime performance. We propose several improvements to the early termination technique of the HO algorithm. While further improving its memory advantage over YTO, we significantly improve the runtime performance of the HO algorithm to the extent that the proposed algorithm has runtime performance that is comparable to YTO for circuit-based graphs and for dense randomly generated graphs.
items.abstract_zh: 有向图中最小周期均值 (MCM) 的概念在电路和系统设计中有许多应用。据报道，Young、Tarjan 和 Orlin (YTO) 的算法在使用二叉堆实现时是实践中最快的 MCM 算法，即使它的渐近时间复杂度比 Karp 算法更高。然而，由于 YTO 的有效实现依赖于数据冗余，因此其内存使用量较高，并且可能成为大尺寸问题的阻碍因素。另一方面，卡普算法的典型实现也可能会占用大量内存，从而将其应用限制为仅解决小规模问题。 Hartmann 和 Orlin (HO) 的提前终止技术可以直接应用于 Karp 算法，以提高其运行时性能。提前终止还允许按需分配内存，这可以减少卡普算法的内存需求。在我们基于 IWLS 2005 基准电路构建的图和随机生成的图的评估中，我们凭经验观察到 HO 算法（或采用 HO 算法的提前终止技术的 Karp 算法）的内存使用量比 YTO 少得多，但在运行时性能上落后于 YTO。我们对 HO 算法的提前终止技术提出了一些改进。在进一步提高其相对于 YTO 的内存优势的同时，我们显着提高了 HO 算法的运行时性能，使得所提出的算法对于基于电路的图和密集随机生成图的运行时性能与 YTO 相当。

items.title: Migrating Assertions From Dense to Discrete Time.
items.abstract: Mixed-signal assertions need to be monitored over dense time during analog simulation because analog events are not aligned with clock boundaries in general. On the other hand, simulation of large integrated circuits regularly employs clocked approximations to accelerate the simulation of the analog content in the design. Migrating the analog assertions from the continuous setting to the discrete setting is necessary to monitor compliance in the digital–analog boundary, but such migration must ensure that assertion failures are not missed due to the loss in precision. We propose the formal basis for this migration and a methodology for choosing the granularity of the clock for an assertion in the digital setting.
items.abstract_zh: 在模拟仿真期间，需要在密集的时间内监视混合信号断言，因为模拟事件通常与时钟边界不对齐。另一方面，大型集成电路的仿真通常采用时钟近似来加速设计中模拟内容的仿真。将模拟断言从连续设置迁移到离散设置对于监控数模边界的合规性是必要的，但这种迁移必须确保不会因精度损失而错过断言失败。我们提出了这种迁移的正式基础以及在数字环境中为断言选择时钟粒度的方法。

items.title: A Probabilistic Machine Learning Approach for the Uncertainty Quantification of Electronic Circuits Based on Gaussian Process Regression.
items.abstract: This article introduces a probabilistic machine learning framework for the uncertainty quantification (UQ) of electronic circuits based on the Gaussian process regression (GPR). As opposed to classical surrogate modeling techniques, GPR inherently provides information on the model uncertainty. The main contribution of this work is twofold. First, it describes how, in a UQ scenario, the model uncertainty can be combined with the uncertainty of the input design parameters to provide confidence bounds for the statistical estimates of the system outputs, such as moments and probability distributions. These confidence bounds allow assessing the accuracy of the predicted statistics. Second, in order to deal with dynamic multioutput systems, principal component analysis (PCA) is effectively employed to compress the time-dependent output variables into a smaller set of components, for which the training of individual GPR models becomes feasible. The uncertainty on the principal components is then propagated back to the original output variables. Several application examples, ranging from a trivial RLC circuit to real-life designs, are used to illustrate and validate the advocated approach.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于高斯过程回归 (GPR) 的电子电路不确定性量化 (UQ) 的概率机器学习框架。与经典的替代建模技术相反，探地雷达本质上提供了有关模型不确定性的信息。这项工作的主要贡献是双重的。首先，它描述了在 UQ 场景中如何将模型不确定性与输入设计参数的不确定性相结合，为系统输出（例如矩和概率分布）的统计估计提供置信界限。这些置信界限允许评估预测统计数据的准确性。其次，为了处理动态多输出系统，有效地采用主成分分析（PCA）将瞬态输出变量压缩为较小的成分集，从而使单个探地雷达模型的训练变得可行。主成分的不确定性随后传播回原始输出变量。几个应用示例（从简单的 RLC 电路到实际设计）用于说明和验证所提倡的方法。

items.title: Time-Dependent Electromigration Modeling for Workload-Aware Design-Space Exploration in STT-MRAM.
items.abstract: Electromigration (EM) has been known as a reliability threatening factor for back-end-of-the-line interconnects. Spin-transfer torque magnetic RAM (STT-MRAM) is an emerging nonvolatile memory that has gained a lot of attention in recent years. However, relatively large operational current magnitude is a challenge for this technology, and hence, EM can be a potential reliability concern, even for the signal lines of this memory. A workload-aware EM modeling needs to capture time-dependent current density in the memory signal lines and to be able to predict the effect of the EM phenomenon on the interconnect for its entire lifetime. In this work, we present methods to effectively model the workload-dependent EM-induced meantime to failure (MTTF) in typical STT-MRAM arrays under a variety of realistic workloads. This allows performing the design-space exploration to co-optimize reliability and other design metrics.
items.abstract_zh: 电迁移 (EM) 被认为是后端互连的可靠性威胁因素。自旋转移矩磁性RAM（STT-MRAM）是一种新兴的非易失性存储器，近年来受到广泛关注。然而，相对较大的工作电流幅度对该技术来说是一个挑战，因此，EM 可能是一个潜在的可靠性问题，即使对于该存储器的信号线也是如此。工作负载感知的 EM 建模需要捕获存储器信号线中随时间变化的电流密度，并能够预测 EM 现象对其整个生命周期内互连的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了在各种实际工作负载下对典型 STT-MRAM 阵列中依赖于工作负载的 EM 引起的故障时间 (MTTF) 进行有效建模的方法。这允许执行设计空间探索以共同优化可靠性和其他设计指标。

items.title: TEA-Z: A Tiny and Efficient Architecture Based on Z Channel for Image Watermarking and Its Versatile Hardware Implementation.
items.abstract: With the popularity of smart phones and digital cameras, authentication and protection of digital images have become important to every producer and consumer. Although many digital watermarking methods have been proposed to mitigate the growing problem of online piracy, their efficient deployment for real-time processing in hardware lacks sufficient attention. Hence, with the first introduction of Z channel, this article advances a tiny and efficient architecture named TEA-Z to implement digital watermarking for color images. Avoiding complex computing units with the general color space conversion (GCSC) and simplified discrete cosine transform (DCT), TEA-Z can better achieve the design goals of low complexity, high efficiency, and easy deployment compared with the latest methods. For FPGA implementation, TEA-Z can achieve the maximum frame rate of 3150 frames/s for 256 × 256 color images and peak energy efficiency of 4.13 × \,\,\textbf 10^\textbf 5 Mbps/W at the maximum frequency of 206.48 MHz. For ASIC implementation, the peak energy efficiency will be 2.40 × \,\,\textbf 10^\textbf 7 Mbps/W with the tiny area of 0.00356 \textbf mm^\textbf 2 and ultralow power of 0.2002 mW at the frequency of 200 MHz under 90-nm CMOS technology. Moreover, TEA-Z can provide various watermarking strategies with its configurations to meet different needs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着智能手机和数码相机的普及，数字图像的认证和保护对于每个生产者和消费者来说变得非常重要。尽管已经提出了许多数字水印方法来缓解日益严重的在线盗版问题，但它们在硬件中实时处理的有效部署缺乏足够的关注。因此，本文首次引入 Z 通道，提出了一种名为 TEA-Z 的小型高效架构来实现数字水印对于彩色图像。 TEA-Z避免了通用色彩空间转换（GCSC）和简化离散余弦变换（DCT）的复杂计算单元，与最新方法相比，TEA-Z可以更好地实现低复杂度、高效率和易于部署的设计目标。对于 FPGA 实现，TEA-Z 可以实现 256 个 3150 帧/秒的最大帧速率 × 256 幅彩色图像，峰值能效为 4.13 × \,\,\textbf 10^\textbf 5 Mbps/W（最大频率为 206.48 MHz）。对于 ASIC 实施，峰值能效将为 2.40 × \,\,\textbf 10^\textbf 7 Mbps/W，微小区域为 0.00356 \textbf mm^\textbf 2 以及 90 nm CMOS 技术下 200 MHz 频率下 0.2002 mW 的超低功耗。此外，TEA-Z可以通过其配置提供多种水印策略，以满足不同的需求。

items.title: RTL-ConTest: Concolic Testing on RTL for Detecting Security Vulnerabilities.
items.abstract: This article presents RTL-ConTest, a register transfer-level (RTL) security vulnerability detection algorithm, that extracts critical process flows from a RTL design and executes RTL-level concolic testing to generate security test cases for identifying critical exploits manifested in a System on Chip (SoC). The efficiency of the proposed approach is evaluated on opensource RISC-V-based SoCs. Our technique is successful in detecting the security vulnerabilities manifested in the processor core as well as in the rest of the SoC, e.g., debug modules, peripherals, etc., thereby providing a thorough vulnerability check on the entire hardware design. As demonstrated by our experimental results, in circumstances where conventional security verification tools are limited, RTL-ConTest furnishes significantly improved efficiency in detecting SoC security vulnerabilities.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍 RTL-ConTest，这是一种寄存器传输级 (RTL) 安全漏洞检测算法，该算法从 RTL 设计中提取关键流程并执行 RTL 级 concolic 测试，以生成安全测试用例，用于识别片上系统 (SoC) 中出现的关键漏洞。该方法的效率在基于开源 RISC-V 的 SoC 上进行了评估。我们的技术成功地检测出处理器核心以及 SoC 其余部分（例如调试模块、外设等）中出现的安全漏洞，从而对整个硬件设计提供彻底的漏洞检查。我们的实验结果表明，在传统安全验证工具有限的情况下，RTL-ConTest 显着提高了检测 SoC 安全漏洞的效率。

items.title: elfPlace: Electrostatics-Based Placement for Large-Scale Heterogeneous FPGAs.
items.abstract: elfPlace is a flat nonlinear placement algorithm for large-scale heterogeneous field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). We adopt the analogy between placement and electrostatic systems initially proposed by ePlace and extend it to tackle heterogeneous blocks in FPGA designs. To achieve satisfiable solution quality with fast and robust numerical convergence, an augmented Lagrangian formulation together with a preconditioning technique and a normalized subgradient-based multiplier updating scheme are proposed. Besides pure-wirelength minimization, we also propose a unified instance area adjustment scheme to simultaneously optimize routability, pin density, and downstream clustering compatibility. We further propose run-to-run deterministic GPU acceleration techniques to speedup the global placement. Our experiments on the ISPD 2016 benchmark suite show that elfPlace outperforms four state-of-the-art FPGA placers UTPlaceF , RippleFPGA , GPlace3.0 , and UTPlaceF-DL by 13.5%, 10.2%, 8.8%, and 7.0%, respectively, in routed wirelength with competitive runtime.
items.abstract_zh: elfPlace 是一种用于大规模异构现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的平面非线性布局算法。我们采用 ePlace 最初提出的布局和静电系统之间的类比，并将其扩展以解决 FPGA 设计中的异构模块。为了通过快速且鲁棒的数值收敛获得令人满意的解质量，提出了一种增强拉格朗日公式以及预处理技术和基于归一化次梯度的乘子更新方案。除了纯线长最小化之外，我们还提出了统一的实例区域调整方案，以同时优化可布线性、引脚密度和下游集群兼容性。我们进一步提出运行到运行确定性 GPU 加速技术来加速全局布局。我们在 ISPD 2016 基准测试套件上进行的实验表明， elfPlace 优于四个最先进的 FPGA 布局器 UTPlaceF ， RippleFPGA 、 GPlace3.0 和 UTPlaceF-DL 在具有竞争性运行时间的路由线长中分别增加了 13.5%、10.2%、8.8% 和 7.0%。

items.title: BiSuT: A NoC-Based Bit-Shuffling Technique for Multiple Permanent Faults Mitigation.
items.abstract: Since several decades, fault tolerance has become a major research field due to transistor shrinking and core number increasing in system-on-chip (SoC). Especially, faults occurring to the network-on-chips (NoCs) of those systems have a significant impact, due to the high amount of data, crossing the NoC, for the communication among intellectual properties (IPs). Furthermore, existing fault-tolerant approaches cannot efficiently deal with several permanent faults, which occur in NoC routers. To address these limitations, we propose the bit shuffling method (BiSuT) for fault-tolerant NoCs that reduces the impact of faults on data communications. To achieve that, the proposed approach exploits, at runtime, the position of permanent faults and changes the order of bits inside a flit. Our method reduces, as much as possible, the impact of faults by transferring the faults on least significant bits (LSBs), instead of keeping them on most significant bits (MSBs). The results obtained by extensive evaluations show that BiSuT can reduce the impact of multiple permanent faults, with low hardware costs, compared to the existing approaches, like the Hamming code.
items.abstract_zh: 几十年来，由于片上系统（SoC）中晶体管的缩小和内核数量的增加，容错已成为一个主要的研究领域。特别是，这些系统的片上网络 (NoC) 发生的故障会对知识产权 (IP) 之间的通信产生重大影响，因为跨 NoC 的数据量很大。此外，现有的容错方法无法有效地处理NoC路由器中发生的几种永久性故障。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了用于容错片上网络的位混洗方法（BiSuT），以减少故障对数据通信的影响。为了实现这一点，所提出的方法在运行时利用永久故障的位置并改变 flit 内的位顺序。我们的方法通过将故障转移到最低有效位（LSB）而不是保留最高有效位（MSB）来尽可能减少故障的影响。广泛评估获得的结果表明，与汉明码等现有方法相比，BiSuT 可以降低多个永久性故障的影响，并且硬件成本较低。

items.title: A Content-Based Ransomware Detection and Backup Solid-State Drive for Ransomware Defense.
items.abstract: Ransomware is a growing concern in business and government because it causes immediate financial damages or loss of important data. There is a way to detect and block ransomware in advance, but evolved ransomware can still attack while avoiding detection. Another alternative is to back up the original data. However, existing backup solutions can be under the control of ransomware and backup copies can be destroyed by ransomware. Moreover, backup methods incur storage and performance overhead. In this article, we propose AMOEBA, a device-level backup solution that does not require additional storage for backup. AMOEBA is armed with: 1) a hardware accelerator to run content-based detection algorithms for ransomware detection at high speed and 2) a fine-grained backup control mechanism to minimize space overhead for data backup. For evaluations, we not only implemented AMOEBA using the Microsoft solid-state drive (SSD) simulator but also prototyped it on the OpenSSD-platform. Our extensive evaluations with real ransomware workloads show that AMOEBA has high ransomware detection accuracy with negligible performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 勒索软件越来越受到企业和政府的关注，因为它会造成直接的财务损失或重要数据的丢失。有一种方法可以提前检测和阻止勒索软件，但进化后的勒索软件仍然可以在逃避检测的同时进行攻击。另一种选择是备份原始数据。然而，现有的备份解决方案可能会受到勒索软件的控制，并且备份副本可能会被勒索软件破坏。此外，备份方法会产生存储和性能开销。在本文中，我们提出了 AMOEBA，这是一种设备级备份解决方案，不需要额外的存储来进行备份。 AMOEBA 配备：1) 硬件加速器，用于高速运行基于内容的检测算法，用于勒索软件检测；2) 细粒度备份控制机制，可最大程度地减少数据备份的空间开销。为了进行评估，我们不仅使用 Microsoft 固态硬盘 (SSD) 模拟器实现了 AMOEBA，而且还在 OpenSSD 平台上对其进行了原型设计。我们对真实勒索软件工作负载的广泛评估表明，AMOEBA 具有很高的勒索软件检测准确性，而性能开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: Silicon Photonic Microring Resonators: A Comprehensive Design-Space Exploration and Optimization Under Fabrication-Process Variations.
items.abstract: Silicon photonic microring resonators (MRRs) offer many advantages (e.g., compactness) and are often considered as the fundamental building block in optical interconnects and emerging photonic nanoprocessors and accelerators. Such devices are, however, sensitive to inevitable fabrication-process variations (FPVs) stemming from optical lithography imperfections. Consequently, silicon photonic integrated circuits (PICs) integrating MRRs often suffer from high power overhead required to compensate for the impact of FPVs on MRRs and, hence, realizing a reliable operation. On the other hand, the design space of MRRs is complex, including several correlated design parameters, thereby further exacerbating the design optimization of MRRs under FPVs. In this article, we present, for the first time, a comprehensive design-space exploration in passive and active MRRs under FPVs. In addition, we present design optimization in MRRs under FPVs while considering different performance metrics, such as tolerance to FPVs, quality factor, and 3-dB bandwidth in MRRs. Simulation and fabrication results obtained by measuring multiple fabricated MRRs designed using our design-space exploration demonstrate a significant 70% improvement on average in the MRRs’ tolerance to different FPVs. Furthermore, we apply the proposed design optimization to a case study of a wavelength-selective MRR-based demultiplexer, where we show considerable channel-spacing accuracy within 0.5 nm even when the MRRs are placed 500 mu \textm apart on a chip. Such improvements indicate the efficiency of the proposed design-space exploration and optimization to enable power-efficient and variation-resilient PICs and optical interconnects integrating MRRs.
items.abstract_zh: 硅光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 具有许多优点（例如紧凑性），通常被认为是光学互连以及新兴光子纳米处理器和加速器的基本构建模块。然而，此类设备对光学光刻缺陷造成的不可避免的制造工艺变化（FPV）很敏感。因此，集成 MRR 的硅光子集成电路 (PIC) 通常会遭受高功率开销，需要补偿 FPV 对 MRR 的影响，从而实现可靠的操作。另一方面，MRR的设计空间复杂，包含多个相关的设计参数，从而进一步加剧了FPV下MRR的设计优化。在本文中，我们首次提出了 FPV 下被动和主动 MRR 的全面设计空间探索。此外，我们还提出了 FPV 下 MRR 的设计优化，同时考虑了不同的性能指标，例如 FPV 容差、品质因数和 MRR 中的 3 dB 带宽。通过测量使用我们的设计空间探索设计的多个制造的 MRR 获得的仿真和制造结果表明，MRR 对不同 FPV 的耐受性平均显着提高了 70%。此外，我们将所提出的设计优化应用于基于波长选择性 MRR 的解复用器的案例研究，其中即使 MRR 放置 500，我们也显示出 0.5 nm 以内的相当大的通道间距精度notation="LaTeX">$\mu \text{m}$ 在芯片上分开。这些改进表明了所提出的设计空间探索和优化的效率，以实现节能且抗变化的 PIC 和集成 MRR 的光学互连。

items.title: An MILP Encoding for Efficient Verification of Quantized Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Quantized deep neural networks (DNNs) have the potential to find wide applications in safety-critical cyber–physical systems implemented on processors supporting only integer arithmetic. The significant challenge therein is to ensure the correctness of the operation of the network with its approximated computation. To address this verification challenge formally, we present a methodology to encode the verification problem into a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) problem. Our encoding is based on the bit-precise semantics of quantized neural networks, which ensures the soundness of our method. We implement our verification methodology using the Gurobi MILP solver and evaluate it on several widely used DNN benchmarks. We compare our method with state-of-the-art bit-vector encodings, which are outperformed by our MILP-based verification methodology by an order of magnitude in most cases. These experimental results establish our MILP-based verification technique as a powerful tool for developing formally verified safety-critical systems with quantized DNNs as a component.
items.abstract_zh: 量化深度神经网络（DNN）有可能在仅支持整数算术的处理器上实现的安全关键网络物理系统中找到广泛的应用。其中的重大挑战是通过其近似计算来确保网络运行的正确性。为了正式解决这一验证挑战，我们提出了一种将验证问题编码为混合整数线性规划（MILP）问题的方法。我们的编码基于量化神经网络的位精确语义，这确保了我们方法的可靠性。我们使用 Gurobi MILP 求解器实施验证方法，并在几个广泛使用的 DNN 基准上对其进行评估。我们将我们的方法与最先进的位向量编码进行比较，在大多数情况下，我们基于 MILP 的验证方法的性能优于一个数量级。这些实验结果使我们基于 MILP 的验证技术成为一种强大的工具，可用于开发以量化 DNN 作为组件的经过形式验证的安全关键系统。

items.title: Dispersion in Placement: Quantification and Insights.
items.abstract: The linearity of data converters fabricated in modern CMOS processes is typically limited by device mismatch. The dispersion in device placement primarily determines the extent of matching and hence, the chip yield. Till date, there exists no straightforward approach to precisely quantify dispersion over an array of identically laid out devices. The current research formulates new measures to quantify dispersion in device placement.
