Adversarial examples are inputs that have been carefully perturbed to fool classifier networks, while appearing unchanged to humans. Based on prior works on detecting adversaries, we propose a structured methodology of augmenting a deep neural network (DNN) with a detector subnetwork. We use adversarial noise sensitivity (ANS), a novel metric for measuring the adversarial gradient contribution of different intermediate layers of a network. Based on the ANS value, we append a detector to the most sensitive layer. In prior works, more complex detectors were added to a DNN, increasing the inference computational cost of the model. In contrast, our structured and strategic addition of a detector to a DNN reduces the complexity of the model while making the overall network adversarially resilient. Through comprehensive white-box and black-box experiments on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, we show that our method improves state-of-the-art detector robustness against adversarial examples. Furthermore, we validate the energy efficiency of our proposed adversarial detection methodology through an extensive energy analysis on various hardware scalable CMOS accelerator platforms. We also demonstrate the effects of quantization on our detector-appended networks.
items.abstract_zh: 神经网络在计算机视觉方面取得了显着的性能，但它们很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。对抗性示例是经过精心扰动以愚弄分类器网络的输入，而对人类来说似乎没有变化。基于先前检测对手的工作，我们提出了一种用检测器子网络增强深度神经网络（DNN）的结构化方法。我们使用对抗性噪声敏感性（ANS），这是一种用于测量网络不同中间层的对抗性梯度贡献的新颖指标。根据 ANS 值，我们将检测器附加到最敏感的层。在之前的工作中，DNN 中添加了更复杂的检测器，增加了模型的推理计算成本。相比之下，我们在 DNN 中结构化和战略性地添加检测器降低了模型的复杂性，同时使整个网络具有对抗性弹性。通过对 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 进行全面的白盒和黑盒实验，我们表明我们的方法提高了最先进的检测器针对对抗性示例的鲁棒性。此外，我们通过对各种硬件可扩展 CMOS 加速器平台进行广泛的能量分析，验证了我们提出的对抗性检测方法的能量效率。我们还演示了量化对附加检测器网络的影响。

items.title: VECBEE: A Versatile Efficiency-Accuracy Configurable Batch Error Estimation Method for Greedy Approximate Logic Synthesis.
items.abstract: Approximate computing is an emerging strategy to improve the energy efficiency of many error-tolerant applications. To design an approximate circuit automatically, many approximate logic synthesis (ALS) methods have been proposed, among which many are greedy. To improve the synthesis quality of these greedy methods, one key is to calculate the errors of all candidate approximate transformations accurately. However, the traditional simulation-based method is time consuming. Instead, many existing methods just perform quick but inaccurate error estimation. In this work, to improve both the accuracy and runtime of error estimation, we propose VECBEE, a versatile efficiency–accuracy configurable batch error estimation method for greedy ALS. It is based on Monte Carlo simulation and an efficient technique to capture whether a signal change due to an introduced approximation will be propagated to each primary output. VECBEE is generally applicable to any statistical error measurement, such as error rate and average error magnitude, and any graph-based circuit representation. It allows a flexible tradeoff between the error estimation accuracy and the runtime, while even the fully accurate version is much faster than the traditional simulation-based method. We apply VECBEE to two representative greedy ALS methods and demonstrate its effectiveness in generating better approximate circuits. The code of VECBEE is made open source.
items.abstract_zh: 近似计算是一种新兴策略，旨在提高许多容错应用程序的能源效率。为了自动设计近似电路，已经提出了许多近似逻辑综合（ALS）方法，其中许多是贪婪的。为了提高这些贪心方法的综合质量，关键是准确计算所有候选近似变换的误差。然而，传统的基于模拟的方法非常耗时。相反，许多现有方法只是执行快速但不准确的误差估计。在这项工作中，为了提高误差估计的准确性和运行时间，我们提出了 VECBEE，一种用于贪婪 ALS 的多功能效率-精度可配置批量误差估计方法。它基于蒙特卡罗模拟和一种有效的技术，用于捕获由于引入的近似而导致的信号变化是否会传播到每个主输出。 VECBEE 通常适用于任何统计误差测量，例如误差率和平均误差幅度，以及任何基于图形的电路表示。它允许在误差估计精度和运行时间之间进行灵活的权衡，而即使是完全准确的版本也比传统的基于仿真的方法快得多。我们将 VECBEE 应用于两种代表性的贪婪 ALS 方法，并证明其在生成更好的近似电路方面的有效性。 VECBEE的代码是开源的。

items.title: Code Synthesis for Dataflow-Based Embedded Software Design.
items.abstract: Model-driven methodology has been widely adopted in embedded software design, and Dataflow is a widely used computation model, with strong modeling and simulation ability supported in tools such as Ptolemy. However, its code synthesis support is quite limited, which restricts its applications in real industrial practice. In this article, we focus on the automatic code synthesis of Dataflow, and implement DFSynth , a code generator that could support most of the widely used modeling features, such as the expression type and Boolean switch, more efficiently. First, we disassemble the Dataflow model into actors embedded in if-else or switch-case statements based on the schedule analysis, which bridges the semantic gap between the code and the original Dataflow model. Then, we design well-designed templates for each actor, and synthesize well-structured executable C and Java codes with sequential code assembly. Compared to the existing C and Java code generators of Dataflow model in Ptolemy-II, and the C code generator in Simulink, the lines of code synthesized by DFSynth are decreased by an average of 99.7%, 81.4%, and 61.9%, and the execution time of the synthesized code by DFSynth is also decreased by an average of 76.2%, 56.8%, and 22.7%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 模型驱动方法在嵌入式软件设计中得到广泛采用，Dataflow是一种广泛使用的计算模型，具有强大的建模和仿真能力，有托勒密等工具支持。然而，其代码合成支持相当有限，这限制了其在实际工业实践中的应用。在本文中，我们重点关注Dataflow的自动代码合成，并实现DFSynth，一个可以更高效地支持大多数广泛使用的建模功能（例如表达式类型和布尔开关）的代码生成器。首先，我们根据调度分析将 Dataflow 模型分解为嵌入 if-else 或 switch-case 语句中的参与者，从而弥合了代码和原始 Dataflow 模型之间的语义差距。然后，我们为每个参与者设计精心设计的模板，并通过顺序代码汇编合成结构良好的可执行 C 和 Java 代码。与 Ptolemy-II 中现有的 Dataflow 模型的 C 和 Java 代码生成器以及 Simulink 中的 C 代码生成器相比，DFSynth 合成的代码行数平均减少了 99.7%， 81.4% 和 61.9%，DFSynth 合成代码的执行时间也平均分别减少了 76.2%、56.8% 和 22.7%。

items.title: MDD: A Unified Model-Driven Design Framework for Embedded Control Software.
items.abstract: Model-driven methods are widely used in embedded control software development. Current design tools, such as Ptolemy-II and Simulink, have strong modeling capability but their simulation and code generation functionalities are challenged by the increasing complexity of control requirements. For simulation, emulating the triggering of the actor leads to additional time overhead and speed degradation. For code generation, generating redundant content degrades the code quality. Besides, current tools do not have a unified interface, which makes it difficult to cooperation. In this article, we propose a unified model-driven design framework MDD to facilitate embedded control software development. MDD can support the unification of models built by different modeling tools for high-efficiency simulation and high-quality code generation. The MDD framework supports the expansion of more modeling tools, and also supports the expansion of more uses, such as unified testing and verification. First, it offers a model intermediate representation (MIR) and several corresponding parsers, which facilitate a unified representation and cooperation for different design tools. Then, based on data flow schedule analysis of the original MIR, intermediate code representation will be generated for optimized code synthesis. Finally, a variety of code translators will synthesize the intermediate code representation into the code of actual use, such as code for simulation and code for deployment. For evaluation, we enhance two widely used design tools in industry, Ptolemy-II and Simulink, and apply them on the implementation of several benchmark models and a real-world self-driving control software of our industrial collaborator. Using MDD can help reduce their simulation time by 98.9% and 92.6%, the generated code by 99.7% and 69.9% in the number of lines, and 94.3% and 34.3% in code execution time, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 模型驱动方法广泛应用于嵌入式控制软件开发。当前的设计工具，如Ptolemy-II和Simulink，具有强大的建模能力，但它们的仿真和代码生成功能受到控制需求日益复杂性的挑战。对于模拟来说，模拟参与者的触发会导致额外的时间开销和速度下降。对于代码生成来说，生成冗余内容会降低代码质量。此外，目前的工具没有统一的界面，导致协作困难。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的模型驱动设计框架MDD来促进嵌入式控制软件的开发。 MDD可以支持不同建模工具构建的模型的统一，以实现高效仿真和高质量代码生成。 MDD框架支持扩展更多的建模工具，也支持扩展更多的用途，比如统一测试、验证等。首先，它提供了模型中间表示（MIR）和几个相应的解析器，有助于不同设计工具的统一表示和协作。然后，基于原始MIR的数据流调度分析，将生成中间代码表示以优化代码合成。最后，各种代码翻译器会将中间代码表示合成为实际使用的代码，例如用于模拟的代码和用于部署的代码。为了进行评估，我们增强了两种在工业中广泛使用的设计工具：Ptolemy-II 和 Simulink，并将它们应用于我们工业合作者的几个基准模型和实际自动驾驶控制软件的实现。使用 MDD 可以帮助将仿真时间分别减少 98.9% 和 92.6%，生成的代码行数分别减少 99.7% 和 69.9%，代码执行时间分别减少 94.3% 和 34.3%。

items.title: Experimental Validation of a Novel Methodology for Electromigration Assessment in On-Chip Power Grids.
items.abstract: A recently proposed theoretical methodology for the assessment of the electromigration (EM) induced IR-drop degradation in on-chip power/ground grids has been validated by means of measurements performed on real silicon. A voltage tapping technique was employed for the direct measurement of voltage variations at 162 nodes of the power net, stressed with 10 mA constant source current at an elevated temperature of 350 °C. A voltage drop between cathode and anode pads exceeding a specified threshold was considered as a failure. Times-to-failure (TTF) was measured on 19 packaged test grids and used for computing the mean TTF (MTTF). The EM-induced voltage degradation in this grid was also analyzed with an assessment methodology based on a simulation of stress evolution everywhere in the grid, resulting in a voiding in some of grid branches and corresponding resistance increase. A set of voiding compact models for different grid segments was developed and used in the simulations. The stochastic nature of the EM phenomenon was captured by introducing random distributions of atomic diffusivities and critical stresses across the grid and iterating them with Monte Carlo loops. A good fit between the measured voltage evolution kinetics at different grid nodes and that predicted by simulation, and the good agreement between measured and simulated failure distributions can be considered as the ever first experimental validation of this EM assessment methodology for on-chip power/ground (p/g) grids.
items.abstract_zh: 最近提出的用于评估片上电源/接地网格中电迁移 (EM) 引起的 IR 压降退化的理论方法已通过在真实硅上进行的测量得到验证。采用电压分接技术直接测量电网 162 个节点的电压变化，并在 350 °C 的高温下施加 10 mA 恒定源电流。阴极和阳极垫之间的电压降超过指定阈值被视为故障。在 19 个封装测试网格上测量无故障时间 (TTF)，并用于计算平均 TTF (MTTF)。还使用基于网格各处应力演化模拟的评估方法来分析该网格中电磁引起的电压降级，导致一些网格分支出现空洞并相应增加电阻。开发了一组针对不同网格段的空隙紧凑模型并在模拟中使用。通过在网格上引入原子扩散率和临界应力的随机分布并使用蒙特卡罗循环对其进行迭代，捕获了电磁现象的随机性质。不同电网节点的测量电压演化动力学与仿真预测之间的良好拟合，以及测量和仿真故障分布之间的良好一致性，可以被视为对片上电源/接地 (p/g) 网格的电磁评估方法的首次实验验证。

items.title: Deep Reinforcement-Learning-Guided Backup for Energy Harvesting Powered Systems.
items.abstract: Energy harvesting technology has been widely developed as a promising alternative of battery to power embedded systems. However, energy harvesting powered embedded systems may have potential frequent power interruptions due to unstable energy supply. Nonvolatile processors (NVPs) are proposed to survive power failures by saving volatile data to nonvolatile memory (NVM) upon power failures and resuming them after power comes back. Traditionally, backup is triggered immediately when an energy warning occurs. However, it is also possible to more aggressively utilize the residual energy for program execution to improve forward progress. In this work, we propose a deep reinforcement-learning-guided backup strategy to improve forward progress in energy harvesting powered intermittent embedded systems. The experimental results show an average of 8.3%, 51.6%, and 325.3% improved forward progress compared with Q -learning, the related work ALD, and traditional instant backup, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 能量收集技术已被广泛开发为一种有前景的电池替代品，为嵌入式系统供电。然而，能量收集供电的嵌入式系统可能会由于不稳定的能源供应而出现频繁的电源中断。非易失性处理器 (NVP) 旨在通过在电源故障时将易失性数据保存到非易失性存储器 (NVM) 并在电源恢复后恢复这些数据来应对电源故障。传统上，当发生能源警告时，备份会立即触发。然而，也可以更积极地利用剩余能量来执行程序，以提高前进的进度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种深度强化学习引导的备份策略，以提高能量收集驱动的间歇性嵌入式系统的前进进度。实验结果显示，与 Q -学习、相关工作 ALD 和传统即时备份相比，平均前进进度分别提高了 8.3%、51.6% 和 325.3%。

items.title: Counteracting Adversarial Attacks in Autonomous Driving.
items.abstract: This article studies the robust deep stereo vision in autonomous driving systems and counteracting adversarial attacks. The autonomous system operation requires real-time processing of measurement data which often contain significant uncertainties and noise. Adversarial attacks have been widely studied to simulate these perturbations in recent years. To counteract the practical attacks in autonomous systems, novel methods based on simulated attacks are proposed in this article. Univariate and multivariate functions are adopted to represent the relationships between the left and right input images and the deep stereo model. A stereo regularizer is proposed to guide the model to learn the implicit relationship between the images and characterize the loss function’s local smoothness. The attacks are generated by maximizing the regularizer term to break the linearity and smoothness. The model then defends the attacks by minimizing the loss and regularization terms. Two techniques are developed in this article. The first technique, SmoothStereo , explores the basic knowledge from the physical world and smoothness, while the second technique, SmoothStereoV2 , improves SmoothStereo through leveraging the smooth activation functions during the defense. SmoothStereoV2 can learn and utilize the gradient information concerning the attacks. The gradients of the smooth activation functions can handle attacks for improving the model robustness. Numerical experiments on KITTI datasets demonstrate that the proposed methods offer superior performance.
items.abstract_zh: 本文研究了自动驾驶系统中强大的深度立体视觉和对抗对抗性攻击。自主系统运行需要实时处理测量数据，这些数据通常包含显着的不确定性和噪声。近年来，对抗性攻击已被广泛研究来模拟这些扰动。为了对抗自治系统中的实际攻击，本文提出了基于模拟攻击的新方法。采用单变量和多元函数来表示左右输入图像与深度立体模型之间的关系。提出了立体正则化器来指导模型学习图像之间的隐式关系并表征损失函数的局部平滑度。这些攻击是通过最大化正则项来破坏线性度和平滑度而产生的。然后，该模型通过最小化损失和正则化项来防御攻击。本文开发了两种技术。第一种技术 SmoothStereo 探索物理世界和平滑度的基础知识，而第二种技术 SmoothStereoV2 ，改进 SmoothStereo 通过在防御过程中利用平滑激活功能。 SmoothStereoV2 可以学习和利用有关攻击的梯度信息。平滑激活函数的梯度可以处理攻击，从而提高模型的鲁棒性。 KITTI 数据集上的数值实验表明，所提出的方法具有优越的性能。

items.title: Optimizing Random Forest-Based Inference on RISC-V MCUs at the Extreme Edge.
items.abstract: Random forests (RFs) use a collection of decision trees (DTs) to perform the classification or regression. RFs are adopted in a wide variety of machine learning (ML) applications, and they are finding increasing use also in scenarios at the extreme edge of the Internet of Things (TinyML) where memory constraints are particularly tight. This article addresses the optimization of the computational and storage costs for running DTs on the microcontroller units (MCUs) typically deployed in TinyML scenarios. We introduce three alternative DT kernels optimized for memory- and compute-limited MCUs, providing insight into the key memory-latency tradeoffs on an open-source RISC-V platform. We identify key bottlenecks and demonstrate that SW optimizations enable up to significant memory footprint and latency decrease. Experimental results show that the optimized kernels achieve up to 4.5 mu \texts latency, 4.8× speedup, and 45% storage reduction against the widely-adopted naive DT design. We carry out a detailed performance and energy cost analysis of various optimized DT variants: the best approach requires just 8 instructions and 0.155 pJ per decision.
items.abstract_zh: 随机森林 (RF) 使用决策树 (DT) 集合来执行分类或回归。 RF 被广泛应用于各种机器学习 (ML) 应用中，而且它们在内存限制特别严格的物联网 (TinyML) 极端边缘的场景中也得到越来越多的使用。本文讨论了在 TinyML 场景中通常部署的微控制器单元 (MCU) 上运行 DT 的计算和存储成本的优化。我们引入了三种针对内存和计算有限的 MCU 进行优化的替代 DT 内核，从而深入了解开源 RISC-V 平台上的关键内存延迟权衡。我们确定了关键瓶颈，并证明软件优化可以显着减少内存占用并减少延迟。实验结果表明，优化后的内核可实现高达 4.5 的 mu \texts 延迟， 4.8× 与广泛采用的朴素 DT 设计相比，速度提升了 45%，存储空间减少了 45%。我们对各种优化的 DT 变体进行了详细的性能和能源成本分析：最佳方法只需 8 条指令和每个决策 0.155 pJ。

items.title: MPFA: An Efficient Multiple Faults-Based Persistent Fault Analysis Method for Low-Cost FIA.
items.abstract: In recent studies, a fault analysis method, called persistent fault analysis (PFA), is proposed for cracking block ciphers. Unlike widely used differential fault analysis methods, PFA does not require correct cihpertexts and precise time control of fault injection. The existing PFA methods mainly assume single fault, i.e., the fault injection process induces a single fault in the target cipher devices. However, the existing low-cost fault injection attack (FIA) techniques, such as clock glitch injection and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) injection usually induce multiple faults per injection. Given multiple faults, the existing PFA methods are either not applicable or faced with high computational complexity in practice. In this article, a new PFA method, called MPFA, is proposed for multiple persistent faults, which reduces both the computational complexity and the required ciphertexts. MPFA can be applied to the ciphertexts-only attack scenario, where all fault positions, fault values, and fault quantity are unknown. The experiments show that compared to the existing PFA methods, the MPFA method reduces the required ciphertexts for cracking AES by at least 57.5% and reduces the computational complexity NF^16 times for NF faults. The proposed MPFA is also evaluated on the block ciphers LED and PRINCE. Moreover, a real EMP FIA is carried out and the key of AES-128 is successfully cracked by the MPFA method, demonstrating its validity and efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 在最近的研究中，提出了一种称为持久故障分析（PFA）的故障分析方法来破解分组密码。与广泛使用的差分故障分析方法不同，PFA 不需要正确的密文和精确的故障注入时间控制。现有的PFA方法主要假设单一故障，即故障注入过程在目标密码装置中诱发单一故障。然而，现有的低成本故障注入攻击（FIA）技术，例如时钟毛刺注入和电磁脉冲（EMP）注入通常每次注入都会引发多个故障。由于存在多种缺陷，现有的 PFA 方法要么不适用，要么在实践中面临较高的计算复杂度。在本文中，针对多个持续性故障提出了一种新的 PFA 方法，称为 MPFA，该方法降低了计算复杂度和所需的密文。 MPFA适用于所有故障位置、故障值、故障数量未知的纯密文攻击场景。实验表明，与现有的PFA方法相比，MPFA方法将破解AES所需的密文减少了至少57.5%，并降低了计算复杂度 NF^16 次 NF 缺点。所提出的 MPFA 还在分组密码 LED 和 PRINCE 上进行了评估。并进行了真实的EMP FIA，利用MPFA方法成功破解了AES-128密钥，验证了其有效性和效率。

items.title: Enabling Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization From On-Device Learning of the Video Stream.
items.abstract: Detecting actions in videos have been widely applied in on-device applications, such as cars, robots, etc. Practical on-device videos are always untrimmed with both action and background. It is desirable for a model to both recognize the class of action and localize the temporal position where the action happens. Such a task is called temporal action location (TAL), which is always trained on the cloud where multiple untrimmed videos are collected and labeled. It is desirable for a TAL model to continuously and locally learn from new data, which can directly improve the action detection precision while protecting customers’ privacy. However, directly training a TAL model on the device is nontrivial. To train a TAL model which can precisely recognize and localize each action, tremendous video samples with temporal annotations are required. However, annotating videos frame by frame is exorbitantly time consuming and expensive. Although weakly supervised temporal action localization (W-TAL) has been proposed to learn from untrimmed videos with only video-level labels, such an approach is also not suitable for on-device learning scenarios. In practical on-device learning applications, data are collected in streaming. For example, the camera on the device keeps collecting video frames for hours or days, and the actions of nearly all classes are included in a single long video stream. Dividing such a long video stream into multiple video segments requires lots of human effort, which hinders the exploration of applying the TAL tasks to realistic on-device learning applications. To enable W-TAL models to learn from a long, untrimmed streaming video, we propose an efficient video learning approach that can directly adapt to new environments. We first propose a self-adaptive video dividing approach with a contrast score-based segment merging approach to convert the video stream into multiple segments. Then, we explore different sampling strategies on the TAL tasks to request as few labels as possible. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first attempt to directly learn from the on-device, long video stream. Experimental results on the THUMOS’14 dataset show that the performance of our approach is comparable to the current W-TAL state-of-the-art (SOTA) work without any laborious manual video splitting.
items.abstract_zh: 检测视频中的动作已广泛应用于设备上的应用，例如汽车、机器人等。实际的设备上视频总是没有经过动作和背景的修剪。我们希望模型能够识别动作类别并定位动作发生的时间位置。这样的任务称为时间动作定位（TAL），它始终在云端进行训练，在云端收集和标记多个未修剪的视频。 TAL 模型需要不断地在本地学习新数据，这可以直接提高动作检测精度，同时保护客户的隐私。然而，直接在设备上训练 TAL 模型并非易事。为了训练一个能够精确识别和定位每个动作的 TAL 模型，需要大量带有时间注释的视频样本。然而，逐帧注释视频非常耗时且昂贵。尽管弱监督时间动作定位（W-TAL）已被提出来从仅具有视频级标签的未修剪视频中进行学习，但这种方法也不适合设备上的学习场景。在实际的设备上学习应用程序中，数据以流式传输的方式收集。例如，设备上的摄像头持续收集视频帧数小时或数天，并且几乎所有类别的动作都包含在单个长视频流中。将这么长的视频流分成多个视频片段需要大量的人力，这阻碍了将 TAL 任务应用于现实的设备上学习应用程序的探索。为了使 W-TAL 模型能够从未经修剪的长流视频中学习，我们提出了一种可以直接适应新环境的高效视频学习方法。我们首先提出了一种自适应视频分割方法，采用基于对比度分数的片段合并方法，将视频流转换为多个片段。然后，我们在 TAL 任务上探索不同的采样策略，以请求尽可能少的标签。据我们所知，我们是第一次尝试直接从设备上的长视频流中学习。 THUMOS’14 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法的性能可与当前 W-TAL 最先进的 (SOTA) 工作相媲美，无需任何费力的手动视频分割。

items.title: Correlated Rare Failure Analysis via Asymptotic Probability Evaluation.
items.abstract: In this article, a novel asymptotic probability evaluation (APE) method is proposed to estimate the probability of correlated rare failure events for complex integrated systems containing a large number of replicated cells. The key idea is to approximate the failure rate of the entire system by solving a set of nonlinear equations derived from a general analytical model. An error refinement method based on look-up table is further developed to improve numerical stability and, hence, reduce estimation error. Furthermore, a statistical algorithm based on resampling is developed to accurately estimate the confidence interval of APE. Our numerical experiments demonstrate that compared to the state-of-the-art method, APE can reduce the estimation error by up to 30× without increasing the computational cost.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，提出了一种新颖的渐近概率评估（APE）方法，用于估计包含大量复制单元的复杂集成系统中相关罕见故障事件的概率。关键思想是通过求解从通用分析模型导出的一组非线性方程来近似整个系统的故障率。进一步开发了基于查找表的误差细化方法，以提高数值稳定性，从而减少估计误差。此外，还开发了一种基于重采样的统计算法来准确估计 APE 的置信区间。我们的数值实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，APE 可以将估计误差减少高达 30× 不增加计算成本。

items.title: Nonuniform Compressive Sensing via Ohmic Voltage Attenuation: A Memristive Crossbar Design Approach Leveraging Intrinsic Computation.
items.abstract: Compressive sensing (CS) is a promising technique for transmitting signals in power-critical applications such as Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Nonuniform CS optimizes this process by adjusting sampling frequency based on the relative importance levels characterized by the signal of interest. Recent advances have yielded energy-efficient hardware implementations of CS sampling, leveraging spin-based crossbar architectures for in-memory vector-matrix multiplication and through the use of probabilistic bit (p-bit) devices to generate tunable random outputs for writing the array. Thus, a region of interest is generated via column-ordered density of on-state devices. Herein, we propose a simple design for supplying inputs to the p-bit devices, based on Ohmic voltage attenuation occurring along the word lines of the crossbar array. The technique embeds some required computations to be conducted intrinsically by the cross-points of the memristive array, thus bypassing overheads of conventional instruction execution and eliminating the need for costly hardware components, such as lookup tables (LUTs) and data converters. The design is shown to be robust for various array sizes and parasitics while generating the appropriate tuning signals within a single clock cycle duration of 1.6 ns, and at an energy overhead of 333 fJ. Compared with a standard approach using LUTs and digital to-analog converters, the design herein achieves a 583-fold reduction in energy and 23-fold reduction in transistor count.
items.abstract_zh: 压缩传感 (CS) 是一种很有前途的技术，用于在物联网 (IoT) 设备等功耗关键型应用中传输信号。非均匀 CS 通过根据感兴趣信号表征的相对重要性级别调整采样频率来优化此过程。最近的进展已经产生了 CS 采样的节能硬件实现，利用基于自旋的交叉架构进行内存中向量矩阵乘法，并通过使用概率位 (p 位) 设备来生成用于写入阵列的可调随机输出。因此，通过导通状态器件的列排序密度生成感兴趣区域。在此，我们提出了一种简单的设计，用于向 p 位器件提供输入，该设计基于沿交叉开关阵列的字线发生的欧姆电压衰减。该技术嵌入了一些由忆阻阵列的交叉点本质上进行的所需计算，从而绕过了传统指令执行的开销，并消除了对昂贵的硬件组件的需求，例如查找表（LUT）和数据转换器。事实证明，该设计对于各种阵列尺寸和寄生效应都具有鲁棒性，同时能够在 1.6 ns 的单个时钟周期持续时间内以 333 fJ 的能量开销生成适当的调谐信号。与使用 LUT 和数模转换器的标准方法相比，本文的设计实现了 583 倍的能耗降低和 23 倍的晶体管数量减少。

items.title: 3D-ICE 3.0: Efficient Nonlinear MPSoC Thermal Simulation With Pluggable Heat Sink Models.
items.abstract: The increasing power density in modern high-performance multiprocessor System-on-Chip (MPSoC) is fueling a revolution in thermal management. On the one hand, thermal phenomena are becoming a critical concern, making accurate and efficient simulation a necessity. On the other hand, a variety of physically heterogeneous solutions is coming into play: liquid, evaporative, thermoelectric cooling, and more. A new generation of simulators, with unprecedented flexibility, is thus required. In this article, we present 3D-ICE 3.0, the first thermal simulator to allow for accurate nonlinear descriptions of complex and physically heterogeneous heat dissipation systems, while preserving the efficiency of latest compact modeling frameworks at the silicon die level. 3D-ICE 3.0 allows designers to extend the thermal simulator with new heat sink models while simplifying the time-consuming step of model validation. The support for nonlinear dynamic models is included, for instance, to accurately represent variable coolant flows. Our results present validated models of a commercial water heat sink and an air heat sink plus fan that achieve an average error below 1 °C and simulate, respectively, up to 3× and 12× faster than the real physical phenomena.
items.abstract_zh: 现代高性能多处理器片上系统 (MPSoC) 不断提高的功率密度正在推动热管理领域的一场革命。一方面，热现象正成为人们关注的焦点，因此必须进行准确、高效的模拟。另一方面，各种物理异构解决方案正在发挥作用：液体、蒸发、热电冷却等。因此，需要具有前所未有的灵活性的新一代模拟器。在本文中，我们介绍了 3D-ICE 3.0，这是第一个热模拟器，可以对复杂且物理异构的散热系统进行精确的非线性描述，同时保持硅芯片级最新紧凑建模框架的效率。 3D-ICE 3.0 允许设计人员使用新的散热器模型扩展热模拟器，同时简化模型验证的耗时步骤。例如，包括对非线性动态模型的支持，以准确表示可变的冷却剂流量。我们的结果展示了商用水散热器和空气散热器加风扇的经过验证的模型，其平均误差低于 1 °C，并且分别模拟高达 3× 和 12× 比真实物理现象快。

items.title: Fast Design Space Exploration of Nonlinear Systems: Part II.
items.abstract: Nonlinear system design is often a multiobjective optimization problem involving the search for a design that satisfies a number of predefined constraints. The design space is typically very large since it includes all possible system architectures with different combinations of components composing each architecture. In this article, we address nonlinear system design space exploration through a two-step approach encapsulated in a framework called fast design space exploration of nonlinear systems (ASSENT). In the first step, we use a genetic algorithm to search for system architectures that allow discrete choices for component values or else only component values for a fixed architecture. This step yields a coarse design since the system may or may not meet the target specifications. In contrast to prior works on design space exploration that rely on forward design, we use an inverse design in step 2 to search over a continuous space and fine-tune the component values with the goal of improving the value of the objective function. We use a neural network (NN) to model the system response. The NN is converted into a mixed-integer linear program for active learning to sample component values efficiently. We illustrate the efficacy of ASSENT on problems ranging from nonlinear system design to the design of electrical circuits. Experimental results show that ASSENT achieves the same or better value of the objective function compared to various other optimization techniques for nonlinear system design by up to 53%. We improve sample efficiency by 6– 12× compared to reinforcement learning-based synthesis of electrical circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 非线性系统设计通常是一个多目标优化问题，涉及搜索满足许多预定义约束的设计。设计空间通常非常大，因为它包括所有可能的系统架构以及构成每个架构的不同组件组合。在本文中，我们通过封装在称为非线性系统快速设计空间探索（ASSENT）的框架中的两步方法来解决非线性系统设计空间探索。第一步，我们使用遗传算法来搜索允许对组件值进行离散选择或仅对固定架构选择组件值的系统架构。此步骤产生粗略设计，因为系统可能满足也可能不满足目标规格。与之前依赖正向设计的设计空间探索工作相比，我们在步骤 2 中使用逆向设计来搜索连续空间并微调组件值，以提高目标函数的值。我们使用神经网络（NN）来模拟系统响应。神经网络被转换为混合整数线性程序，用于主动学习以有效地采样组件值。我们展示了 ASSENT 在解决从非线性系统设计到电路设计等问题上的功效。实验结果表明，与非线性系统设计的各种其他优化技术相比，ASSENT 可以实现相同或更好的目标函数值，提升高达 53%。与基于强化学习的电路合成相比，我们将样本效率提高了 6– 12× 。

items.title: COMPACT: Flow-Based Computing on Nanoscale Crossbars With Minimal Semiperimeter and Maximum Dimension.
items.abstract: In-memory computing is a promising solution strategy for data-intensive applications to circumvent the von Neumann bottleneck. Flow-based computing is the concept of performing in-memory computing using sneak paths in nanoscale crossbar arrays. The limitation of the previous work is that the resulting crossbar representations have large size. In this article, we present a framework called COMPACT for mapping Boolean functions to crossbar representations with a minimal semiperimeter (the number of wordlines plus bitlines) and/or maximum dimension (the maximum of the wordlines or bitlines). The COMPACT framework is based on an analogy between binary decision diagrams (BDDs) and nanoscale memristor crossbar arrays. More specifically, nodes and edges in a BDD correspond to wordlines/bitlines and memristors in a crossbar array, respectively. The relation enables a Boolean function represented by a BDD with n nodes and an odd cycle transversal of size k to be mapped to a crossbar with a semiperimeter of n+k . The k extra wordlines/bitlines are introduced due to crossbar connection constraints, i.e., wordlines (bitlines) cannot directly be connected to wordlines (bitlines). Moreover, there exists a tradeoff between the semiperimeter and maximum dimension. Consequently, COMPACT can sometimes reduce the maximum dimension by slightly increasing the length of the semiperimeter. We also extend COMPACT to handle multioutput functions using shared BDD (SBDDs) and alignment constraints on the inputs and outputs. Compared with the state-of-the-art mapping technique, the semiperimeter and maximum dimension are reduced by 55% and 85%, respectively. The area, power consumption, and computation delay are reduced by 89%, 19%, 56%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算是数据密集型应用程序绕过冯·诺依曼瓶颈的一种有前途的解决方案策略。基于流的计算是使用纳米级交叉阵列中的潜行路径执行内存计算的概念。先前工作的局限性在于生成的交叉表示尺寸较大。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 COMPACT 的框架，用于将布尔函数映射到具有最小半周长（字线加位线的数量）和/或最大维度（字线或位线的最大值）的交叉表示。 COMPACT 框架基于二元决策图 (BDD) 和纳米级忆阻器交叉阵列之间的类比。更具体地，BDD中的节点和边分别对应于交叉阵列中的字线/位线和忆阻器。该关系启用由 BDD 表示的布尔函数，该 BDD 具有 n 节点和大小为 k 映射到半周长为 n+k 。由于 crossbar 连接的限制，引入了额外的字线/位线，即字线（位线）不能直接连接到字线（位线）。此外，半周长和最大尺寸之间存在折衷。因此，COMPACT 有时可以通过稍微增加半周长来减小最大尺寸。我们还使用共享 BDD (SBDD) 和输入和输出的对齐约束来扩展 COMPACT 来处理多输出函数。与最先进的测绘技术相比，半周长和最大尺寸分别减少了 55% 和 85%。面积、功耗和计算延迟分别减少89%、19%、56%。

items.title: LoCoMOBO: A Local Constrained Multiobjective Bayesian Optimization for Analog Circuit Sizing.
items.abstract: A local constrained multiobjective Bayesian optimization (LoCoMOBO) method is introduced to address automatic sizing and tradeoff exploration for analog and RF integrated circuits (ICs). LoCoMOBO applies to constrained optimization problems utilizing multiple Gaussian process (GP) models that approximate the objective and constraint functions locally in the search space. It searches for potential pareto optimal solutions within trust regions of the search space using only a few time-consuming simulations. The trust regions are adaptively updated during the optimization process based on feasibility and hypervolume metrics. In contrast to mainstream Bayesian optimization approaches, LoCoMOBO uses a new acquisition function that can provide multiple query points, therefore allowing for parallel execution of costly simulations. GP inference is also enhanced by using GPU acceleration in order to handle highly constrained problems that require large sample budgets. Combined with a framework for schematic parametrization and simulator calls, LoCoMOBO provides improved performance tradeoffs and sizing results on three real-world circuit examples, while reducing the total runtime up to × 43 times compared to state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 引入局部约束多目标贝叶斯优化 (LoCoMOBO) 方法来解决模拟和射频集成电路 (IC) 的自动规模调整和权衡探索问题。 LoCoMOBO 适用于利用多个高斯过程 (GP) 模型的约束优化问题，这些模型在搜索空间中局部逼近目标函数和约束函数。它仅使用一些耗时的模拟来在搜索空间的信任区域内搜索潜在的帕累托最优解。信任区域在优化过程中根据可行性和超体积指标进行自适应更新。与主流贝叶斯优化方法相比，LoCoMOBO 使用新的采集函数，可以提供多个查询点，因此允许并行执行昂贵的模拟。 GP 推理还通过使用 GPU 加速得到增强，以处理需要大量样本预算的高度受限问题。结合原理图参数化和模拟器调用的框架，LoCoMOBO 在三个实际电路示例中提供了改进的性能权衡和调整结果，同时将总运行时间减少到 $× 43$ 倍。

items.title: Intermittent-Aware Distributed Concurrency Control.
items.abstract: Internet of Things (IoT) devices are gradually adopting battery-less, energy harvesting solutions, thereby driving the development of an intermittent computing paradigm to accumulate computation progress across multiple power cycles. While many attempts have been made to enable standalone intermittent systems, little attention has focused on IoT networks formed by intermittent devices. We observe that the computation progress improved by distributed task concurrency in an intermittent network can be significantly offset by data unavailability due to frequent system failures. This article presents an intermittent-aware distributed concurrency control protocol which leverages existing data copies inherently created in the network to improve the computation progress of concurrently executed tasks. In particular, we propose a borrowing-based data management method to increase data availability and an intermittent two-phase commit procedure incorporated with distributed backward validation to ensure data consistency in the network. The proposed protocol was integrated into a FreeRTOS-extended intermittent operating system running on Texas Instruments devices. Experimental results show that the computation progress can be significantly improved, and this improvement is more apparent under weaker power, where more devices will remain offline for longer duration.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 设备逐渐采用无电池能量收集解决方案，从而推动间歇性计算范式的发展，以累积多个电源周期的计算进度。尽管人们已经做出了许多尝试来实现独立的间歇性系统，但很少有人关注由间歇性设备形成的物联网网络。我们观察到，间歇性网络中分布式任务并发所提高的计算进度可能会因频繁的系统故障而导致的数据不可用而被显着抵消。本文提出了一种间歇感知分布式并发控制协议，该协议利用网络中固有创建的现有数据副本来提高并发执行任务的计算进度。特别是，我们提出了一种基于借用的数据管理方法来提高数据可用性，以及一种与分布式向后验证相结合的间歇性两阶段提交过程，以确保网络中的数据一致性。所提出的协议已集成到在德州仪器 (TI) 设备上运行的 FreeRTOS 扩展间歇性操作系统中。实验结果表明，计算进度可以得到显着提升，并且这种提升在较弱的功率下更加明显，此时更多的设备将保持离线状态更长的时间。

items.title: A Bridge-Based Compression Algorithm for Topological Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: Topological quantum error correction (TQEC) is promising for scalable fault-tolerant quantum computation. The required resource of a TQEC circuit can be modeled as its space-time volume of a three-dimensional geometric description. Implementing a quantum algorithm with a reasonable physical qubit number and computation time is challenging for large-scale complex problems. Therefore, it is desirable to minimize the space-time volume for large-scale TQEC circuits. Previous work proposed bridge compression, which can significantly compress a TQEC circuit, but it was performed manually. This article presents the first automated tool that can perform bridge compression on a large-scale TQEC circuit. Our proposed algorithm applies the bridge compression technique to compactify TQEC circuits with modularization. Besides, we offer a time-ordering-aware 2.5-D placement for compacting TQEC circuits and satisfying time-ordered measurement constraints. On the other hand, we suggest friend net-aware routing to effectively reduce the required routing resource under topological deformation. Compared with the state-of-the-art work, experimental results show that our proposed algorithm can averagely reduce space-time volumes by 84%.
items.abstract_zh: 拓扑量子纠错（TQEC）有望用于可扩展的容错量子计算。 TQEC 电路所需的资源可以建模为其三维几何描述的时空体积。对于大规模复杂问题来说，实现具有合理物理量子比特数和计算时间的量子算法具有挑战性。因此，需要最小化大规模 TQEC 电路的时空体积。之前的工作提出了桥压缩，它可以显着压缩 TQEC 电路，但它是手动执行的。本文介绍了第一个可以在大规模 TQEC 电路上执行桥压缩的自动化工具。我们提出的算法应用桥压缩技术来通过模块化来压缩 TQEC 电路。此外，我们还提供时间顺序感知的 2.5 维布局，用于压缩 TQEC 电路并满足时间顺序测量约束。另一方面，我们建议朋友使用网络感知路由，以有效减少拓扑变形下所需的路由资源。与最先进的工作相比，实验结果表明，我们提出的算法平均可以减少 84% 的时空体积。

items.title: OPDB: A Scalable and Modular Design Benchmark.
items.abstract: Progress in electronic design automation (EDA) has enabled us to manage the exponential growth of complexity in integrated circuits (ICs) allowed by Moore’s Law, and translate it into performance improvements. Furthermore, as Moore’s law slows down and with the collapse of Dennard scaling over the past decade, EDA tools become increasingly important in addressing inefficiencies in ICs. As new proposals and techniques are put forward to address the current and future issues of IC design, a concrete set of contemporary benchmarks needs to be used for their evaluation. Traditionally, EDA researchers have mainly relied on industry provided design benchmarks in evaluating the performance of their tools. However, due to their effort to maintain their competitive advantage, industry releases include older designs with limited information about the details of each design. This means that in multiple cases, new proposals are evaluated with significantly dated designs, often more than a decade old, especially in terms of scale. In this work, we describe OPDB: a scalable, modular, heterogeneous, and extensible design benchmark for the EDA community. OPDB leverages and extends the OpenPiton open-source, tile-based research infrastructure to create a surplus of design benchmarks that target different components. Due to the tiled nature of this architecture, OPDB benchmarks can be made arbitrarily large in order to evaluate the efficiency of EDA tools across different design scales and configurations. OPDB contains several accelerators enabling full SoC designs to be used as benchmarks for EDA tools.
items.abstract_zh: 电子设计自动化 (EDA) 的进步使我们能够管理摩尔定律允许的集成电路 (IC) 复杂性的指数增长，并将其转化为性能改进。此外，随着过去十年摩尔定律的放缓以及登纳德缩放比例的崩溃，EDA 工具在解决 IC 效率低下问题方面变得越来越重要。随着新的提案和技术被提出来解决 IC 设计当前和未来的问题，需要使用一套具体的当代基准对其进行评估。传统上，EDA 研究人员主要依靠行业提供的设计基准来评估其工具的性能。然而，由于他们努力保持竞争优势，行业版本包括较旧的设计，有关每个设计细节的信息有限。这意味着在多种情况下，新的提案是用明显过时的设计来评估的，通常已经有十多年的历史了，特别是在规模方面。在这项工作中，我们描述了 OPDB：EDA 社区的可扩展、模块化、异构和可扩展的设计基准。 OPDB 利用并扩展了 OpenPiton 开源、基于图块的研究基础设施，以创建针对不同组件的大量设计基准。由于该架构的平铺性质，OPDB 基准可以任意大，以便评估不同设计规模和配置的 EDA 工具的效率。 OPDB 包含多个加速器，使完整的 SoC 设计能够用作 EDA 工具的基准。

items.title: High-Performance Accurate and Approximate Multipliers for FPGA-Based Hardware Accelerators.
items.abstract: Multiplication is one of the widely used arithmetic operations in a variety of applications, such as image/video processing and machine learning. FPGA vendors provide high-performance multipliers in the form of DSP blocks. These multipliers are not only limited in number and have fixed locations on FPGAs but can also create additional routing delays and may prove inefficient for smaller bit-width multiplications. Therefore, FPGA vendors additionally provide optimized soft IP cores for multiplication. However, in this work, we advocate that these soft multiplier IP cores for FPGAs still need better designs to provide high-performance and resource efficiency. Toward this, we present generic area-optimized, low-latency accurate, and approximate softcore multiplier architectures, which exploit the underlying architectural features of FPGAs, i.e., lookup table (LUT) structures and fast-carry chains to reduce the overall critical path delay (CPD) and resource utilization of multipliers. Compared to Xilinx multiplier LogiCORE IP, our proposed unsigned and signed accurate architecture provides up to 25% and 53% reduction in LUT utilization, respectively, for different sizes of multipliers. Moreover, with our unsigned approximate multiplier architectures, a reduction of up to 51% in the CPD can be achieved with an insignificant loss in output accuracy when compared with the LogiCORE IP. For illustration, we have deployed the proposed multiplier architecture in accelerators used in image and video applications, and evaluated them for area and performance gains. Our library of accurate and approximate multipliers is opensource and available online at https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads to fuel further research and development in this area, facilitate reproducible research, and thereby enabling a new research direction for the FPGA community.
items.abstract_zh: 乘法是图像/视频处理和机器学习等各种应用中广泛使用的算术运算之一。 FPGA 供应商以 DSP 模块的形式提供高性能乘法器。这些乘法器不仅数量有限并且在 FPGA 上具有固定位置，而且还会产生额外的布线延迟，并且对于较小位宽的乘法可能效率低下。因此，FPGA供应商另外提供了针对乘法优化的软IP核。然而，在这项工作中，我们主张这些用于 FPGA 的软乘法器 IP 核仍然需要更好的设计来提供高性能和资源效率。为此，我们提出了通用的面积优化、低延迟精确和近似软核乘法器架构，该架构利用 FPGA 的底层架构特征，即查找表 (LUT) 结构和快速进位链来减少乘法器的整体关键路径延迟 (CPD) 和资源利用率。与 Xilinx 乘法器 LogiCORE IP 相比，我们提出的无符号和有符号精确架构对于不同大小的乘法器，LUT 利用率分别降低了 25% 和 53%。此外，与 LogiCORE IP 相比，利用我们的无符号近似乘法器架构，可以将 CPD 降低高达 51%，而输出精度的损失却微乎其微。为了便于说明，我们在图像和视频应用中使用的加速器中部署了所提出的乘法器架构，并评估了它们的面积和性能增益。我们的精确和近似乘数库是开源的，可在 https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads 在线获取，以推动该领域的进一步研究和开发，促进可重复的研究，从而为以下领域开辟新的研究方向： FPGA 社区。

items.title: XMAP: Programming Memristor Crossbars for Analog Matrix-Vector Multiplication: Toward High Precision Using Representable Matrices.
items.abstract: Linear transformations are the dominating computation within many important applications. The natural multiply-and-accumulate feature of memristor crossbar arrays promise unprecedented processing capabilities to resistive dot-product engines (DPEs), which can accelerate approximate matrix–vector multiplication (MVM). Unfortunately, the precision of the analog computation may be degraded by parasitics, nonlinear device characteristics, and variations. In this article, we propose a framework, called XMAP, for mapping an arbitrary matrix into appropriate memristor conductance values (or state variables for nonlinear devices). The specified conductance values are next programmed to the memristor hardware using accurate closed-loop tuning. XMAP is based on formulating the mapping problem as a mathematical optimization problem, which can be elegantly minimized using the concept of representable matrices, i.e., the matrices that can be represented on a crossbar. Compared to the state-of-the-art conversion algorithm, the computational accuracy is improved with up to 3.29 × at the expense of overhead in runtime. The precision improvements translate into noteworthy application-level benefits within signal compression and neural network inference.
items.abstract_zh: 线性变换是许多重要应用中的主导计算。忆阻器交叉阵列的自然乘法和累加功能为电阻点积引擎（DPE）提供了前所未有的处理能力，可以加速近似矩阵向量乘法（MVM）。不幸的是，模拟计算的精度可能会因寄生效应、非线性器件特性和变化而降低。在本文中，我们提出了一个称为 XMAP 的框架，用于将任意矩阵映射到适当的忆阻器电导值（或非线性器件的状态变量）。接下来使用精确的闭环调谐将指定的电导值编程到忆阻器硬件。 XMAP 基于将映射问题表述为数学优化问题，可以使用可表示矩阵（即可以在交叉开关上表示的矩阵）的概念来优雅地最小化该问题。与最先进的转换算法相比，计算精度提高了高达 3.29 × 运行时的开销。精度的提高转化为信号压缩和神经网络推理中值得注意的应用级优势。

items.title: Detecting Hardware Trojans Using Combined Self-Testing and Imaging.
items.abstract: Hardware Trojans are malicious modifications in integrated circuits (ICs) with an intent to breach security and compromise the reliability of an electronic system. This article proposes a framework using self-testing, advanced imaging, and image processing with machine learning to detect hardware Trojans inserted by untrusted foundries. It includes on-chip test structures with negligible power, delay, and silicon area overheads. The core step of the framework is on-chip golden circuit design, which can provide authentic samples for image-based Trojan detection through self-testing. This core step enables a golden-chip-free Trojan detection that does not rely on an existing image data set from Trojan-free chip or image synthesizing. We have conducted an in-depth analysis of detection steps and discussed possible attacks with countermeasures to strengthen this framework. The performance evaluation on a 28-nm FPGA and a 90-nm IC validates its high accuracy and reliability for practical applications.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件木马是对集成电路 (IC) 的恶意修改，其目的是破坏安全性并损害电子系统的可靠性。本文提出了一个框架，使用自测试、高级成像和图像处理与机器学习来检测由不受信任的代工厂插入的硬件木马。它包括功耗、延迟和硅面积开销可忽略不计的片上测试结构。该框架的核心步骤是片上黄金电路设计，通过自测可以为基于图像的木马检测提供真实的样本。这一核心步骤实现了无金芯片木马检测，不依赖于无木马芯片或图像合成的现有图像数据集。我们对检测步骤进行了深入分析，并讨论了可能的攻击以及加强该框架的对策。对28 nm FPGA和90 nm IC的性能评估验证了其在实际应用中的高精度和可靠性。

items.title: Photonic Reconfigurable Accelerators for Efficient Inference of CNNs With Mixed-Sized Tensors.
items.abstract: Photonic microring resonator (MRR)-based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this article, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to 1.8× in frames-per-second (FPS) and up to 1.5× in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work.
items.abstract_zh: 基于光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 的硬件加速器已被证明可为深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的处理提供颠覆性的加速和能效改进。然而，之前基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器无法为具有混合大小张量的 CNN 提供高效的适应性。此类 CNN 的一个例子是深度可分离 CNN。在这种不灵活的加速器上使用混合大小的张量执行 CNN 推理通常会导致硬件利用率较低，从而降低了加速器可实现的性能和能源效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器中引入可重构性的新颖方法，以动态最大化加速器硬件组件和使用硬件组件处理的 CNN 张量之间的尺寸兼容性。我们根据加速器中所使用的硬件组件的布局和相对位置，将先前作品中最先进的基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器分为两类。然后，我们使用我们的方法在这两类加速器中引入可重构性，从而提高它们的并行性、有效映射不同大小、速度的张量的灵活性和整体能源效率。我们根据面积比例前景（所有加速器的硬件面积相同）对我们的可重构加速器与之前的三项工作进行了评估。我们对四个现代 CNN 推理的评估表明，我们设计的可重构 CNN 加速器可提供高达 1.8× $ 的改进 以每秒帧数 (FPS) 为单位，最高 1.5× 与之前工作中基于 MRR 的加速器相比，以 FPS/W 计算。

items.title: ASCENT: Communication Scheduling for SDF on Bufferless Software-Defined NoC.
items.abstract: Bufferless software-defined network-on-chip (NoC) is a promising alternative to conventional dynamic routing as it offers predictable data movement with real-time guarantees. Existing time-division multiplexing (TDM)-based mechanisms for predictability assume the worst-case communication pattern (e.g., all-to-all) and compute a fixed schedule wherein the cores can only communicate during the allocated time slots. These approaches lead to low application throughput as they cannot adapt to application characteristics. In this article, we present an application specific, non-TDM-based communication scheduling mechanism for bufferless software-defined NoCs. We choose the synchronous dataflow (SDF) model of computation to represent the input streaming applications. We propose ASCENT, a novel offline approach that takes the SDF-specified streaming application and the NoC architecture as input, exploits the task interactions and the timing information in the SDF, and generates the task-to-core mapping and communication schedule that is represented compactly in hardware. ASCENT achieves 5.8× better performance on average than existing TDM-based NoCs and manages to achieve the performance of an ideal dynamically routed NoC, yet ensuring predictability.
items.abstract_zh: 无缓冲区软件定义片上网络 (NoC) 是传统动态路由的一种有前途的替代方案，因为它提供可预测的数据移动和实时保证。现有的基于时分复用（TDM）的可预测性机制假设最坏情况的通信模式（例如，全部到全部）并计算固定的调度，其中内核只能在分配的时隙期间进行通信。这些方法会导致应用程序吞吐量较低，因为它们无法适应应用程序特性。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于无缓冲软件定义 NoC 的特定于应用的、非基于 TDM 的通信调度机制。我们选择同步数据流（SDF）计算模型来表示输入流应用程序。我们提出了 ASCENT，一种新颖的离线方法，它以 SDF 指定的流应用程序和 NoC 架构作为输入，利用 SDF 中的任务交互和定时信息，并生成在硬件中紧凑表示的任务到核心的映射和通信调度。 ASCENT 实现了 5.8× 平均性能优于现有基于 TDM 的 NoC，并设法实现了该性能理想的动态路由 NoC，同时确保可预测性。

items.title: Heterogeneous FPGA Architecture Using Threshold Logic Gates for Improved Area, Power, and Performance.
items.abstract: The flexibility of field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) is attributed to the reconfigurability of their basic logic elements (BLEs). Traditionally, the BLEs are comprised of one or more lookup tables (LUTs) of n inputs, that are designed to implement Boolean functions of n or fewer inputs. In an attempt to reduce the area and power consumption that comes from using LUTs, a number of complex LUT architectures have been reported. Although most of the proposed complex LUT architectures have resulted in reduced area and power, this has always been at cost of the decreased performance. This article proposes a new FPGA architecture, called threshold logic FPGA (TLFPGA), which results in significant improvement in performance, power, and area (PPA). TLFPGA is comprised of a combination of LUTs and a new type of BLE referred to as a threshold logic cell (TLC) (Muroga, 1987). Although TLCs implement a relatively small subset of Boolean functions known as threshold functions (Muroga, 1987), they require far fewer registers and multiplexers than an LUT, and are also significantly faster. This article describes the architecture of the TLFPGA and a technology mapping algorithm tailored for a TLFGA. On average, TLFPGA designs use 18% fewer registers and multiplexers, which improves the collective area of BLEs by approximately 16%, power by 14%, and performance by 5%. The improvements have been demonstrated in both 40 and 28 nm technologies for ISCAS-85 circuits as well as practical circuits, using industry-standard flows. The improvements were also demonstrated using a layout of the architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的灵活性归因于其基本逻辑元件 (BLE) 的可重构性。传统上，BLE 由一个或多个 n 输入的查找表 (LUT) 组成，旨在实现 n 或更少输入的布尔函数。为了减少使用 LUT 所带来的面积和功耗，已经报道了许多复杂的 LUT 架构。尽管大多数提出的复杂 LUT 架构都导致了面积和功耗的减少，但这始终是以性能下降为代价的。本文提出了一种新的 FPGA 架构，称为阈值逻辑 FPGA (TLFPGA)，它在性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 方面实现了显着改进。 TLFPGA 由 LUT 和一种称为阈值逻辑单元 (TLC) 的新型 BLE 组合而成（Muroga，1987）。尽管 TLC 实现了称为阈值函数的相对较小的布尔函数子集（Muroga，1987），但它们需要的寄存器和多路复用器比 LUT 少得多，而且速度也快得多。本文介绍了 TLFPGA 的架构以及为 TLFGA 量身定制的技术映射算法。平均而言，TLFPGA 设计使用的寄存器和多路复用器减少了 18%，这将 BLE 的总面积提高了约 16%，功耗提高了 14%，性能提高了 5%。这些改进已在 ISCAS-85 电路的 40 和 28 nm 技术以及实际电路中使用行业标准流程得到了证明。还使用架构布局演示了这些改进。

items.title: Design and Experimentation of Inductorless Low-Pass NGD Integrated Circuit in 180-nm CMOS Technology.
items.abstract: This article introduces an innovative design of a low-pass (LP) negative group delay (NGD) integrated circuit (IC) in the 180-nm CMOS technology. The LP-NGD circuit is an inductorless topology constituted by RC-network with CMOS metal-insulator-metal (MIM) capacitor and polygate resistor. The design methodology is illustrated by considering the chip layout process. Then, the first run simulation is performed with the design rule check (DRC) and 2.5 mm × 2.2 mm layout versus schematic (LVS) approaches. The feasibility of the CMOS LP-NGD IC circuit implementation is validated with chip-onboard (CoB). The proof of concept (PoC) of the LP-NGD miniaturized circuit was tested in both S-parameter and time domain (TD). As expected, the calculated, simulated, and experimented results of CoB showing NGD of about −10 ns over 12 MHz and −10 dB attenuation are confirmed. The active CMOS LP-NGD technology compensates the insertion loss to 2.4 dB, the GD reaches −11 ns, and the reflection loss reaches −20 dB. Moreover, TD investigations were also performed to show the feasibility of generating pulse and arbitrary waveform signal time advance through the designed and fabricated LP-NGD CoB prototypes.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了采用 180 nm CMOS 技术的低通 (LP) 负群延迟 (NGD) 集成电路 (IC) 的创新设计。 LP-NGD 电路是一种无电感拓扑，由 RC 网络、CMOS 金属-绝缘体-金属 (MIM) 电容器和多晶硅电阻器构成。通过考虑芯片布局过程来说明设计方法。然后，使用设计规则检查 (DRC) 和 2.5 mm × 执行第一次运行仿真2.2 mm 布局与原理图 (LVS) 方法的比较。 CMOS LP-NGD IC 电路实现的可行性通过板载芯片 (CoB) 进行了验证。 LP-NGD 小型化电路的概念验证 (PoC) 在 S 参数和时域 (TD) 方面进行了测试。正如预期的那样，CoB 的计算、模拟和实验结果显示，12 MHz 上的 NGD 约为 -10 ns，衰减为 -10 dB，这一点得到了证实。有源CMOS LP-NGD技术将插入损耗补偿至2.4dB，GD达到-11ns，反射损耗达到-20dB。此外，还进行了 TD 研究，以展示通过设计和制造的 LP-NGD CoB 原型生成脉冲和任意波形信号时间提前的可行性。

items.title: PDF: Path-Oriented, Derivative-Free Approach for Safety Falsification of Nonlinear and Nondeterministic CPS.
items.abstract: Cyber-physical systems (CPSs) integrate discrete computations with continuous physical processes and can be highly nonlinear and nondeterministic. Unlike the verification of CPS, which is difficult to handle, the falsification of CPS fulfills certain requirements from testing by seeking witness behavior of these systems and is easier to conduct. However, existing falsification techniques may fail to support the general complex CPS in practice because they usually focus on certain restricted classes of systems. In this article, we present a path-oriented, derivative-free approach to falsify safety properties in nonlinear and nondeterministic CPS. In our approach, we model the behavior of CPS by hybrid automata. Then, we enumerate candidate paths of hybrid automata (HA), transform the feasibility of candidate paths into optimization problems, and solve these optimization problems by our newly proposed classification model-based, derivative-free optimization algorithm. We also provide two novel pruning techniques to further improve the efficiency and efficacy of our approach: 1) a nested optimization structure with better model refinements for continuous search space pruning and 2) a hardly feasible path prefixes guided backtracking for discrete search space pruning. We implement our approach into a tool called PDF. Our experiments showed that PDF supported the safety falsification of CPS in all of our benchmarks, and it achieved success rates no lower than 95% in only seconds on 22/28 of the benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 网络物理系统 (CPS) 将离散计算与连续物理过程集成在一起，并且可以是高度非线性和不确定性的。与CPS的验证难以处理不同，CPS的证伪通过寻找这些系统的见证行为来满足测试的某些要求，并且更容易进行。然而，现有的伪造技术在实践中可能无法支持一般的复杂 CPS，因为它们通常专注于某些受限制的系统类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向路径、无导数的方法来伪造非线性和非确定性 CPS 中的安全属性。在我们的方法中，我们通过混合自动机对 CPS 的行为进行建模。然后，我们枚举混合自动机（HA）的候选路径，将候选路径的可行性转化为优化问题，并通过我们新提出的基于分类模型的无导数优化算法来解决这些优化问题。我们还提供了两种新颖的剪枝技术，以进一步提高我们方法的效率和功效：1）具有更好模型细化的嵌套优化结构，用于连续搜索空间剪枝；2）几乎不可行的路径前缀引导回溯，用于离散搜索空间剪枝。我们将我们的方法实施到一个名为 PDF 的工具中。我们的实验表明，PDF 在我们所有的基准测试中都支持 CPS 的安全伪造，并且在 22/28 的基准测试中仅几秒就达到了不低于 95% 的成功率。

items.title: STPAcc: Structural TI-Based Pruning for Accelerating Distance-Related Algorithms on CPU-FPGA Platforms.
items.abstract: As a promising solution to boost the performance of distance-related algorithms (e.g., K -means and KNN), FPGA-based acceleration attracts lots of attention, but also comes with numerous challenges. In this work, we propose, STPAcc , an optimization framework based on structural triangle-inequality (TI)-based pruning (STP) for accelerating distance-related algorithms on CPU-FPGA platforms. STPAcc provides a domain-specific language to unify distance-related algorithms effectively, a structural TI-based pruning strategy to remove unnecessary distance computations, a coarse-grained workload partitioning and mapping strategy to fully exploit the potentials of the CPU-FPGA platform, and fine-grained hardware optimizations to further improve performance on the FPGA. Intensive experiments show that STPAcc designs achieve 31.42× speedup and 99.63× better energy efficiency on average over standard CPU-based implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 作为提高距离相关算法性能的有前景的解决方案（例如， K -means 和 KNN），基于FPGA的加速引起了广泛关注，但也带来了众多挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 STPAcc ，这是一种基于结构三角不等式 (TI) 剪枝 (STP) 的优化框架，用于在 CPU-FPGA 平台上加速与距离相关的算法。 STPAcc 提供了一种有效统一距离相关算法的领域特定语言、一种基于 TI 的结构修剪策略来消除不必要的距离计算、一种粗粒度的工作负载划分和映射策略来充分利用 CPU-FPGA 平台的潜力，以及一种细粒度的硬件优化来进一步提高 FPGA 的性能。密集实验表明，STPAcc 设计实现了 31.42× 加速和 99.63× 与基于 CPU 的标准实现相比，平均能效更高。

items.title: Space-Time-Efficient Modeling of Large-Scale 3-D Cross-Point Memory Arrays by Operation Adaption and Network Compaction.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional (3-D) integrated cross-point memory arrays can be used to build high-density storage-class memory systems. However, the coupled network topology caused by sharing word lines or bit lines between adjacent memory layers significantly enlarges the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations on mega-scale 3-D cross-point memory arrays. We observe that different components of the 3-D cross-point array have different contribution significance to the key metrics of write or read operations, and the distribution patterns of principal components in the arrays are different for write and read operations. We propose an operation-adaptive array modeling framework that exploits the impact of the applied operation on the distribution of array principal components for 3-D cross-point memory arrays. Based on the modeling framework, we propose two array network compaction methods for efficient write and read operation simulations on 3-D cross-point arrays, respectively: 1) pruning zero-biased unselected cells and 2) group-merging neighboring half-selected cells with a specific granularity. Also, serially connected line segments are merged, and floating segments are deleted. Evaluations show that the proposed methods significantly reduce the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations for various layer sizes and different cell-level access parallelism in an array. Besides, the proposed methods can efficiently simulate memory operations on multilayered 3-D cross-point memory arrays with up to 4096× 4096 layer size under the 16-GB memory space constraint, achieving a 64-times improvement in layer size that can be simulated compared with the conventional complete 3-D cross-point array network model.
items.abstract_zh: 三维（3-D）集成交叉点存储器阵列可用于构建高密度存储级存储器系统。然而，相邻存储层之间共享字线或位线所引起的耦合网络拓扑显着增大了大规模3D交叉点存储阵列上的存储操作模拟的存储空间开销和时间成本。我们观察到，3D交叉点数组的不同分量对写入或读取操作的关键指标具有不同的贡献意义，并且数组中主分量的分布模式对于写入和读取操作是不同的。我们提出了一种操作自适应阵列建模框架，该框架利用了所应用的操作对 3D 交叉点存储器阵列的阵列主成分分布的影响。基于建模框架，我们提出了两种阵列网络压缩方法，分别用于在 3D 交叉点阵列上进行高效的写入和读取操作模拟：1）修剪零偏未选择的单元和 2）以特定粒度对相邻的半选择单元进行分组合并。此外，串联连接的线段将被合并，浮动线段将被删除。评估表明，所提出的方法显着降低了阵列中不同层大小和不同单元级访问并行度的内存操作模拟的内存空间开销和时间成本。此外，所提出的方法可以有效地模拟多层3D交叉点存储器阵列上的存储器操作，最高可达 4096× 4096 在16GB内存空间约束下的层大小，与传统完整的3D交叉点阵列网络模型相比，可模拟层大小提高了64倍。

items.title: HERO: Pbit High-Radix Optical Switch Based on Integrated Silicon Photonics for Data Center.
items.abstract: To establish flatten networks and accomplish rapid and efficient communications in the future hyper-scale data centers, HERO, a high-radix optical switch based on integrated silicon photonics, is proposed in this work. The architecture of HERO, including the switch fabric, switch interface, and switch controller, is described in detail. Two new switch control approaches: 1) split-transaction predictive control and 2) wavelength-group switching, are developed. The efficient control together with the optimized high-radix integrated optical switch fabrics help HERO achieve over 1 Pbps switching capacity. Even for small packets, such as 64–256 B Ethernet packets, the maximal utilization of the switch can reach up to 83%, and the throughput can approximate 1 Pbps. Further design explorations on the packet length and some key configurations, including the number of wavelengths and wavelength groups, are also conducted in this work, paving the way to the design of high-performance flatten data-center networks in the future.
items.abstract_zh: 为了在未来的超大规模数据中心建立扁平化网络并实现快速高效的通信，本文提出了一种基于集成硅光子学的高基数光开关HERO。详细描述了HERO的体系结构，包括交换结构、交换接口和交换控制器。开发了两种新的开关控制方法：1）分离事务预测控制和2）波长组切换。高效的控制加上优化的高基集成光交换结构帮助 HERO 实现了超过 1 Pbps 的交换容量。即使对于小数据包，例如64-256 B以太网数据包，交换机的最大利用率也可以达到83%，吞吐量可以接近1 Pbps。这项工作还对数据包长度和一些关键配置（包括波长和波长组）进行了进一步的设计探索，为未来高性能扁平化数据中心网络的设计铺平了道路。

items.title: ViA: A Novel Vision-Transformer Accelerator Based on FPGA.
items.abstract: Since Google proposed Transformer in 2017, it has made significant natural language processing (NLP) development. However, the increasing cost is a large amount of calculation and parameters. Previous researchers designed and proposed some accelerator structures for transformer models in field-programmable gate array (FPGA) to deal with NLP tasks efficiently. Now, the development of Transformer has also affected computer vision (CV) and has rapidly surpassed convolution neural networks (CNNs) in various image tasks. And there are apparent differences between the image data used in CV and the sequence data in NLP. The details in the models contained with transformer units in these two fields are also different. The difference in terms of data brings about the problem of the locality. The difference in the model structure brings about the problem of path dependence, which is not noticed in the existing related accelerator design. Therefore, in this work, we propose the ViA, a novel vision transformer (ViT) accelerator architecture based on FPGA, to execute the transformer application efficiently and avoid the cost of these challenges. By analyzing the data structure in the ViT, we design an appropriate partition strategy to reduce the impact of data locality in the image and improve the efficiency of computation and memory access. Meanwhile, by observing the computing flow of the ViT, we use the half-layer mapping and throughput analysis to reduce the impact of path dependence caused by the shortcut mechanism and fully utilize hardware resources to execute the Transformer efficiently. Based on optimization strategies, we design two reuse processing engines with the internal stream, different from the previous overlap or stream design patterns. In the stage of the experiment, we implement the ViA architecture in Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA and finally achieved ~5.2 times improvement of energy efficiency compared with NVIDIA Tesla V100, and 4–10 times improvement of performance compared with related accelerators based on FPGA, that obtained nearly 309.6 GOP/s computing performance in the peek.
items.abstract_zh: 自谷歌于2017年提出Transformer以来，它在自然语言处理（NLP）方面取得了重大进展。然而，增加的成本是大量的计算和参数。先前的研究人员设计并提出了一些用于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）中的变压器模型的加速器结构，以有效地处理NLP任务。现在，Transformer 的发展也影响了计算机视觉（CV），并在各种图像任务中迅速超越了卷积神经网络（CNN）。并且CV中使用的图像数据和NLP中的序列数据存在明显的差异。这两个领域的变压器单元所包含的模型的细节也不同。数据的差异带来了局部性的问题。模型结构的差异带来了路径依赖的问题，而这一问题在现有的相关加速器设计中并未被注意到。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了 ViA，一种基于 FPGA 的新型视觉变压器 (ViT) 加速器架构，以高效执行变压器应用程序并避免这些挑战的成本。通过分析ViT中的数据结构，我们设计了合适的分区策略，以减少图像中数据局部性的影响，提高计算和内存访问的效率。同时，通过观察ViT的计算流程，我们利用半层映射和吞吐量分析来减少捷径机制带来的路径依赖的影响，充分利用硬件资源高效地执行Transformer。基于优化策略，我们设计了两个具有内部流的复用处理引擎，不同于以往的重叠或流设计模式。在实验阶段，我们在Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA上实现了ViA架构，最终实现了与NVIDIA Tesla V100相比能效提升约5.2倍，与基于FPGA的相关加速器相比性能提升了4-10倍，峰值时获得了近309.6 GOP/s的计算性能。

items.title: A Fast Precision Tuning Solution for Always-On DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Due to the nonvolatility nature of resistive RAM (ReRAM), dynamic operations in the arrays contribute to a much larger portion of power in ReRAM-based neural networks than static power. To reduce the dynamic power of in-situ operations with neural parameters, precision-tuning is considered a viable approach of approximate computing to tradeoff excessive computation exactness for power and efficiency gains. However, the switching overhead of precision tuning in hardware severely impacts its effectiveness when the systems need to quickly react to the change of environment, user constraint or input quality. This work for the first time investigates the feasibility of agile precision tuning for neural network accelerators to benefit from approximate computing. The proposed computing in memory (CiM) CNN accelerators fully utilize the normally off characteristics of memristor crossbars to achieve instant network precision tuning without worrying about the model reloading penalty. The ReRAM-based accelerator, with the proposed neural parameter mapping policy and the novel mixed-model training method, induces negligible precision-switching latency and power consumption when compared with traditional variable precision accelerators. In evaluation with state-of-the-art workloads, the proposed ReRAM deep learning and neural network architecture saves 58.3%–62.47% area overhead over the baseline design. We also leverage the proposed ReRAM accelerator architecture to build a novel always-on key-word spotting (KWS) system. The KWS design can switch between different precision modes to capture the relevant sound with high accuracy. The experimental results show the precision-adjustable KWS architecture saves considerable operating energy when fed with realistic test-sets of audio data.
items.abstract_zh: 由于电阻式 RAM (ReRAM) 的非易失性，阵列中的动态操作在基于 ReRAM 的神经网络中所消耗的功率比静态功率大得多。为了降低神经参数原位操作的动态功耗，精度调整被认为是近似计算的一种可行方法，可以在功耗和效率增益之间权衡过度的计算精确性。然而，当系统需要对环境、用户约束或输入质量的变化做出快速反应时，硬件精确调节的切换开销会严重影响其有效性。这项工作首次研究了神经网络加速器敏捷精确调整以受益于近似计算的可行性。所提出的内存计算（CiM）CNN加速器充分利用忆阻器交叉开关的常闭特性来实现即时网络精度调整，而无需担心模型重新加载损失。与传统的可变精度加速器相比，基于 ReRAM 的加速器采用所提出的神经参数映射策略和新颖的混合模型训练方法，引起的精度切换延迟和功耗可以忽略不计。在对最先进的工作负载进行评估时，所提出的 ReRAM 深度学习和神经网络架构比基准设计节省了 58.3%–62.47% 的面积开销。我们还利用所提出的 ReRAM 加速器架构来构建新颖的始终在线关键词识别 (KWS) 系统。 KWS设计可以在不同精度模式之间切换，以高精度捕获相关声音。实验结果表明，当输入真实的音频数据测试集时，精确可调的 KWS 架构可以节省大量运行能源。

items.title: PVSensing: A Process-Variation-Aware Space Allocation Strategy for 3D NAND Flash Memory.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) flash memory is an emerging memory technology that enables a number of improvements to conventional planar NAND flash memory, including larger capacity, less program disturb, and lower access latency. Despite these advantages, 3D flash memory brings a number of new challenges. First, in 3D flash memory, NAND strings punch through multiple stacked layers to form the 3D infrastructure. Current etching process is unable to manufacture perfect channels with identical feature size. Second, with more stacked layers, the cell current in 3D flash memory is only 20% compared to planar flash memory, making it difficult to give a reliable sensing margin. These issues are affected by process variation, and they pose threats to the integrity of data stored in 3D flash memory. This article present PVSensing , a process-variation-aware space allocation strategy for open-channel SSD with 3D charge-trap flash memory. PVSensing is a novel hardware and file system interface that can transparently allocate physical space in the presence of process variation. PVSensing utilizes the rich functionalities provided by the system infrastructure of open-channel SSD to reduce the uncorrectable bit errors. Three reliability enhancement strategies (i.e., the adaptive creation of fault cubes, the physical block mining, and the live migration of write requests) are proposed. We demonstrate the viability of the proposed technique using a set of extensive experiments. Experimental results show that PVSensing can effectively reduce uncorrectable bit errors, and improve the reliability of critical data with negligible extra erase operations in comparison with representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 闪存是一种新兴的存储技术，它对传统平面 NAND 闪存进行了许多改进，包括更大的容量、更少的程序干扰和更低的访问延迟。尽管有这些优点，3D 闪存也带来了许多新的挑战。首先，在 3D 闪存中，NAND 串穿过多个堆叠层形成 3D 基础设施。目前的蚀刻工艺无法制造具有相同特征尺寸的完美通道。其次，由于堆叠层数较多，3D闪存的单元电流仅为平面闪存的20%，因此难以提供可靠的传感余量。这些问题受到工艺变化的影响，并对 3D 闪存中存储的数据的完整性构成威胁。本文介绍 PVSensing ，这是一种用于具有 3D 电荷陷阱闪存的开放通道 SSD 的过程变化感知空间分配策略。 PVSensing 是一种新颖的硬件和文件系统接口，可以在存在过程变化的情况下透明地分配物理空间。 PVSensing利用开放通道SSD系统基础设施提供的丰富功能来减少不可纠正的比特错误。提出了三种可靠性增强策略（即故障立方体的自适应创建、物理块挖掘和写请求的实时迁移）。我们通过一系列广泛的实验证明了所提出技术的可行性。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，PVSensing可以有效减少不可纠正的位错误，并以可忽略的额外擦除操作提高关键数据的可靠性。

items.title: DBP: Distributed Power Budgeting for Many-Core Systems in Dark Silicon.
items.abstract: Power budget is an important power constraint provided to guarantee the thermal reliability of an integrated system. In this work, we present DBP, a distributed power budgeting method, for dark silicon many-core systems. In DBP, there are two new techniques proposed to bring accurate and optimized power budgets in a distributed way. First, a distributed active core locating technique is developed to find an active core distribution that leads to a high-power budget. Second, a distributed power budget computing technique is introduced which computes the power budget for each active core accurately. Experiments show DBP outperforms the state-of-the-art power budgeting methods’ thermal safe power (TSP) and greedy dynamic power (GDP) on many-core dark silicon systems by providing a high and accurate power budget with low overhead and good scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 功率预算是为保证集成系统的热可靠性而提供的重要功率约束。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DBP，一种用于暗硅众核系统的分布式功率预算方法。 DBP 提出了两种新技术，以分布式方式带来准确且优化的功率预算。首先，开发了一种分布式主动核心定位技术，以找到导致高功率预算的主动核心分布。其次，引入了分布式功率预算计算技术，该技术可以准确计算每个活动核心的功率预算。实验表明，DBP 通过提供高且准确的功率预算、低开销和良好的可扩展性，在多核暗硅系统上优于最先进的功率预算方法的热安全功率 (TSP) 和贪婪动态功率 (GDP)。

items.title: Locking Protocols for Parallel Real-Time Tasks With Semaphores Under Federated Scheduling.
items.abstract: Suspension-based locks are widely used in real-time systems to coordinate simultaneous accesses to exclusive shared resources. Although suspension-based locks have been well studied for sequential real-time tasks, little work has been done on this topic for parallel real-time tasks. This article for the first time studies the problem of how to extend existing sequential-task locking protocols and their analysis techniques to the parallel task model. More specifically, we extend two locking protocols OMLP and OMIP, which were designed for clustered scheduling of sequential real-time tasks, to federated scheduling of parallel real-time tasks. We present corresponding blocking analysis techniques, and develop path-oriented techniques to analyze and count blocking time. Schedulability tests with different efficiency and accuracy are further developed. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our proposed approaches against the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 基于暂停的锁广泛应用于实时系统中，以协调对独占共享资源的同时访问。尽管针对 顺序实时任务 对基于悬浮的锁进行了深入研究，但针对 并行实时任务。本文首次研究了如何将现有的顺序任务锁定协议及其分析技术扩展到并行任务模型的问题。更具体地说，我们将两个锁定协议 OMLP 和 OMIP 扩展为 连续 实时任务的集群调度，以联合调度 并行实时任务。我们提出了相应的阻塞分析技术，并开发了 面向路径 的技术来分析和统计阻塞时间。进一步开发了不同效率和精度的可调度性测试。进行实验是为了评估我们提出的方法与最先进方法的性能。

items.title: Flexible and Efficient QoS Provisioning in AXI4-Based Network-on-Chip Architecture.
items.abstract: We propose a network-on-chip (NoC)-based whole system design, whose communication architecture is compatible with the advanced microcontroller bus architecture advanced extensible interface 4 (AXI4) protocol and supports high-performance multiple quality-of-service (QoS) schemes. In our system, the network interface (NI) between the NoC and the master/slave node is proposed to make the NoC architecture independent from the AXI4 protocol via message format conversion between the AXI4 signal format and the packet format, offering high flexibility to the NoC design. Besides, a QoS inheritance mechanism is applied in the slave-side NI to support QoS during packets’ round-trip transfer in the NoC. The NoC system contains time-division multiplexing (TDM) and virtual channel (VC) subnetworks to apply multiple QoS schemes to AXI4 signals with different QoS tags, and the NI is responsible for signals distribution between two subnetworks. Besides, a traffic converter is proposed in each NI to balance the traffic between the two subnetworks when necessary. The experimental results show that our proposed architecture ensures a high-throughput and low-latency NoC system. By applying the traffic converter, the packet latency can be improved.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于片上网络（NoC）的整体系统设计，其通信架构与先进的微控制器总线架构高级可扩展接口4（AXI4）协议兼容，并支持高性能的多种服务质量（QoS）方案。在我们的系统中，提出了NoC和主/从节点之间的网络接口（NI），通过AXI4信号格式和数据包格式之间的消息格式转换，使NoC架构独立于AXI4协议，为NoC设计提供了高度灵活性。此外，从侧NI中应用了QoS继承机制，以支持数据包在NoC中往返传输期间的QoS。 NoC 系统包含时分复用 (TDM) 和虚拟通道 (VC) 子网，可将多种 QoS 方案应用于具有不同 QoS 标签的 AXI4 信号，NI 负责两个子网之间的信号分配。此外，每个NI中都建议有一个流量转换器，以在必要时平衡两个子网之间的流量。实验结果表明，我们提出的架构确保了高吞吐量和低延迟的NoC系统。通过应用流量转换器，可以改善数据包延迟。

items.title: SoFI: Security Property-Driven Vulnerability Assessments of ICs Against Fault-Injection Attacks.
items.abstract: Fault-injection attacks have become a major concern for hardware designs, primarily due to their powerful capability in tampering with critical locations in a device to cause violation of its integrity, confidentiality, and availability. Researchers have proposed a number of physical and architectural countermeasures against fault-injection attacks; however, these techniques usually come with large overhead and design efforts making them difficult to use in practice. In addition, the current electronic design automation (EDA) tools are not fully equipped to support vulnerability assessment against fault-injection attacks at the design-time for secure hardware development. To perform a design-time (i.e., presilicon) evaluation of such attacks, a designer should be aware of various security vulnerabilities and must perform a tedious manual design review, which is time-consuming and hard to ensure effectiveness. Therefore, it is very important to develop an automatic assessment framework to identify the most security-critical locations in a design to fault-injection attacks and place emphasis on protecting those locations. In this article, we propose an automated framework for fault-injection vulnerability assessment of designs at gate-level, while considering the design-specific security properties (SPs) using novel models and metrics. The proposed framework identifies the faults that can violate the SPs of the design. As a result, applying local countermeasures will be more effective and the protection overhead will be reduced significantly. Our experimental results on the SP of AES, RSA, and SHA implementations show that the security threat from fault-injection attacks can be significantly mitigated by protecting the identified critical locations, which are less than 0.6% of the design.
items.abstract_zh: 故障注入攻击已成为硬件设计的一个主要问题，主要是因为它们具有篡改设备中关键位置以导致其完整性、机密性和可用性遭到破坏的强大能力。研究人员提出了许多针对故障注入攻击的物理和架构对策；然而，这些技术通常需要大量的开销和设计工作，使得它们难以在实践中使用。此外，当前的电子设计自动化（EDA）工具还没有完全支持在安全硬件开发的设计时针对故障注入攻击的漏洞评估。为了对此类攻击进行设计时（即硅前）评估，设计人员应该了解各种安全漏洞，并且必须执行繁琐的手动设计审查，这既耗时又难以确保有效性。因此，开发一个自动评估框架来识别故障注入攻击设计中最安全关键的位置并重点保护这些位置非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于门级设计的故障注入漏洞评估的自动化框架，同时使用新颖的模型和指标考虑特定于设计的安全属性（SP）。所提出的框架可识别可能违反设计 SP 的故障。因此，应用本地对策将更加有效，并且保护开销将显着降低。我们对 AES、RSA 和 SHA 实现的 SP 的实验结果表明，通过保护已识别的关键位置（不到设计的 0.6%）可以显着减轻来自故障注入攻击的安全威胁。

items.title: Equivalence Checking of Sequential Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: We define a formal framework for equivalence checking of sequential quantum circuits. The model we adopt is a quantum state machine, which is a natural quantum generalization of Mealy machines. A major difficulty in checking quantum circuits (but not present in checking classical circuits) is that the state spaces of quantum circuits are continuums. This difficulty is resolved by our main theorem showing that equivalence checking of two quantum Mealy machines can be done with input sequences that are taken from some chosen basis (which are finite) and have a length quadratic in the dimensions of the state Hilbert spaces of the machines. Based on this theoretical result, we develop an (and to the best of our knowledge, the first) algorithm for checking equivalence of sequential quantum circuits with running time \mathcal O(2^3m+5l(2^3m\,+\,2^3l)) , where m and l denote the numbers of input and internal qubits, respectively. The complexity of our algorithm is comparable with that of the known algorithms for checking classical sequential circuits in the sense that both are exponential in the number of (qu)bits. Several case studies and experiments are presented.
items.abstract_zh: 我们定义了一个用于顺序量子电路等价性检查的正式框架。我们采用的模型是量子状态机，它是 Mealy 机的自然量子推广。检查量子电路的一个主要困难（但在检查经典电路中不存在）是量子电路的状态空间是连续体。我们的主要定理解决了这个困难，该定理表明两个量子 Mealy 机的等价性检查可以通过从某个选定的基础（有限的）中获取的输入序列来完成，并且在机器的状态希尔伯特空间的维度上具有长度二次方。基于这一理论结果，我们开发了一种（据我们所知，第一个）算法来检查顺序量子电路与运行时间的等价性 \mathcal O(2^3m+5l(2^3m\,+\,2^3l)) ，其中 m 和 l 表示输入的数量和内部量子位，分别。我们的算法的复杂性与用于检查经典时序电路的已知算法的复杂性相当，因为两者在（qu）位的数量上都是指数级的。介绍了几个案例研究和实验。

items.title: SSSL: Secure Search Space Locking of Behavioral IPs.
items.abstract: Raising the level of VLSI design abstraction from the register transfer level (RTL) to the behavioral level has multiple advantages: 1) It reduces the turn-around-time; 2) allows faster verification; and 3) extends the reusability of the design as high-level synthesis (HLS) automatically reoptimizes the synthesized circuit when new process technologies are available by simply selecting a different technology library. Moreover, HLS makes extensive use of synthesis directives that control how to synthesize mainly loops (unroll or pipeline), arrays (register or RAM), and functions (inline or not). This further increases the reusability of the behavioral code as it enables the generation of micro-architectures with different area versus performance tradeoffs. These advantages open the door to third-party IP (3PIP) vendors providing behavioral IPs (BIPs). Unfortunately, the market of third-party BIPs is still very small and mostly limited to the HLS vendors themselves. Being so flexible is also their main weakness as it makes them only economically viable if the BIP provider can charge a large premium as it is highly unlikely that the BIP consumer will require their service again. Traditional IP vendors discriminate the price of the IP based on the amount of flexibility of the IP, e.g., RTL description versus providing a synthesized gate netlist. We envision a similar price discrimination strategy for BIPs by limiting the reusability of the BIP by partially encrypting the BIP source code. The main idea is to limit the search space, and hence, the reusability of the BIP such that it only allows the BIP consumer to generate micro-architectures within a predefined search space range. This is accomplished by selectively fixing some of the synthesis directives in the form of pragmas at the source code while leaving others explorable. By encrypting the portion of the BIP that contains the fix pragmas we can guarantee that no designs outside of the predefined search space are generated. We believe that this work could serve as catalyst to grow the BIP market.
items.abstract_zh: 将 VLSI 设计抽象级别从寄存器传输级别 (RTL) 提升到行为级别具有多个优点： 1) 减少周转时间； 2）允许更快的验证； 3) 扩展了设计的可重用性，因为当新工艺技术可用时，只需选择不同的技术库，高级综合 (HLS) 就会自动重新优化综合电路。此外，HLS 广泛使用综合指令来控制如何综合主要循环（展开或管道）、数组（寄存器或 RAM）和函数（内联或非内联）。这进一步提高了行为代码的可重用性，因为它能够生成具有不同面积与性能权衡的微架构。这些优势为提供行为 IP (BIP) 的第三方 IP (3PIP) 供应商打开了大门。不幸的是，第三方 BIP 的市场仍然很小，并且大多仅限于 HLS 供应商本身。如此灵活也是他们的主要弱点，因为只有当 BIP 提供商可以收取高额费用时，他们才能在经济上可行，因为 BIP 消费者不太可能再次需要他们的服务。传统 IP 供应商根据 IP 的灵活性（例如 RTL 描述与提供综合门网表）来区分 IP 的价格。我们设想对 BIP 采取类似的价格歧视策略，通过部分加密 BIP 源代码来限制 BIP 的可重用性。主要思想是限制搜索空间，从而限制 BIP 的可重用性，使其只允许 BIP 使用者在预定义的搜索空间范围内生成微架构。这是通过在源代码中以编译指示的形式有选择地修复一些综合指令，同时保留其他指令可探索来实现的。通过加密包含修复指令的 BIP 部分，我们可以保证不会生成预定义搜索空间之外的设计。我们相信这项工作可以成为 BIP 市场发展的催化剂。

items.title: Tinkertoy: Build Your Own Operating Systems for IoT Devices.
items.abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) makes it possible for tiny devices with sensing and communication capabilities to be interconnected and interact with the cyber–physical world. However, these tiny devices have limited computing power and memory, so they often cannot run commodity operating systems, such as Windows and Linux. IoT devices are deployed everywhere, from smart home appliances to self-driving vehicles, and their applications impose ever-increasing and more heterogeneous demands on software architecture. There are many special-purpose and embedded operating systems built to satisfy these wildly different requirements, from early sensor network operating systems, such as TinyOS and Contiki, to more modern robot and real-time control systems, such as FreeRTOS and Zephyr. However, the rapid evolution and heterogeneity of IoT applications calls for a different solution. Specifically, this work introduces Tinkertoy, a collection of standard operating system modules from which developers can easily assemble customized operating systems.
